programme.title: Surviving The Sleepover
programme.desc: When Hannah is invited to popular Melissa's sleepover, she has no idea that she was invited as a prank. But when the night turns more sinister, Hannah's mother becomes her only hope for survival.

programme.title: Girl In The Attic
programme.desc: To honour her mother's memory, Kelsey decides to run a marathon and shares her journey online to raise money. However, her public posts catch the attention of Billy, a seemingly unassuming store worker.

programme.title: World Insight with Tian Wei
programme.desc: World Insight with Tian Wei is a long-running international platform for debate and intelligent discussion. It is the meeting point of both the highly influential and rising voices, facilitated by host, Tian Wei. Every Monday to Friday, it provides nutrition to form your own thoughts and ideas through live debate and interviews. Live debates linking movers and shakers take place in the signature segment "Global Debate".

programme.title: The World Today
programme.desc: The core rolling news service of CGTN, with regular updates from Beijing, Washington, Nairobi and London, keep viewers up-to-date with all the world’s top stories as they happen. The World Today delivers breaking news, live events, in-depth reporting, expert analysis and sustained coverage.

programme.title: Dialogue
programme.desc: Dialogue is a prime time daily English talk show on CGTN. The 30-minute talk show covers a wide range of domestic and international topics, providing a balanced and critical perspective on current affairs and analysis within the framework of cross-cultural and multi-disciplinary comparisons. Inviting decision makers in government, business and academia onto the show, the host encourages guests to speak their minds frankly.

programme.title: Global Business
programme.desc: The flagship business program of CGTN’s English language service. The program offers in-depth analysis of the latest economic data, business trends and market moving policies, zooming in on how all this affects ordinary people. With separate editions out of Asia, Europe, Africa and the Americas, Global Business features analysts and news-makers supported through a global network of correspondents. Global Business shows you what's moving markets in both developed and emerging economies.

programme.title: World Insight with Tian Wei
programme.desc: World Insight with Tian Wei is a long-running international platform for debate and intelligent discussion. It is the meeting point of both the highly influential and rising voices, facilitated by host, Tian Wei. Every Monday to Friday, it provides nutrition to form your own thoughts and ideas through live debate and interviews. Live debates linking movers and shakers take place in the signature segment "Global Debate".

programme.title: The World Today
programme.desc: The core rolling news service of CGTN, with regular updates from Beijing, Washington, Nairobi and London, keep viewers up-to-date with all the world’s top stories as they happen. The World Today delivers breaking news, live events, in-depth reporting, expert analysis and sustained coverage.

programme.title: The Vibe
programme.desc: The Vibe is a 30-minute TV show that runs daily on weekdays on CGTN. The content focuses on exciting new trends, fashion, and cultural topics across a range of disciplines both in China and abroad. The host presents various culture-related topics in a fun way while also doing some in-depth analysis to give viewers a fuller picture as to what is happening, and why it matters.

programme.title: Military Secrets
programme.desc: From clandestine nuclear weapons programmes to a secret Cold War bunker hidden in the mountains, we explore the unlikely people and surprising places behind the discoveries of the top-secret information.

programme.title: Champions Of Breakfast
programme.desc: Will Kellogg is on top of the cereal industry after beating out Post, but now, the king of cereal has met his match with a young flour mill executive. A decades-long war for dominance ensues.

programme.title: America's Lost Treasures
programme.desc: For hundreds of years, there have been legends of vast treasures hidden throughout the United States. Stories of stolen gold, piracy, murderous revenge-but are these legends of lost treasures tall tales?

programme.desc: Astrophysicist Dr. Travis Taylor takes a compelling look back at the many shocking events that the team has encountered during their investigation of the so-called Triangle on Skinwalker Ranch.

programme.title: Treacherous Travel
programme.desc: From exploding cars and blimp disasters to kids sent through the mail and doomed personal helicopters, the past is packed with jaw-dropping travel tales that paved the road to modern transportation.

programme.title: Wildest Weapons
programme.desc: From launching corpses with trebuchets to turning animals into killing machines and missiles guided by pigeons, these are the stories behind history's most outrageous weapons.

programme.title: The Sinking Of The Titanic
programme.desc: The Titanic's story captures the imagination of the public and experts of all kinds, who-decades after the ship's demise-still seek answers. Can new evidence reveal more about how the Titanic sank?

programme.title: Superweapons Of Fear
programme.desc: From the world's largest trebuchet to Nazi super cannons, these are the deadly weapons that rain destruction and spread fear on the battlefield.

programme.title: The Top Ten Alien Codes
programme.desc: Ancient Aliens is counting down ten of the most intriguing and mysterious symbols and codes found across the globe that just might contain proof of otherworldly contact.

programme.title: Killer Queen
programme.desc: The team heads to a target they believe to be the long-lost Marine Sulphur Queen. This massive tanker disappeared in 1963 with a crew of 39 and is one of the most iconic missing Bermuda Triangle wrecks.

programme.title: Bear Down
programme.desc: Lauro continues his quest to complete the Iditarod through the interior of Alaska. Bret and Ivy pursue a bear into dangerously steep terrain. Daniel sets traps for wolves to protect the deer population.

programme.title: Beat The Unbeaten: Mastering The Mystery
programme.desc: In this special competition, two previous champions go head-to-head in a 5-hour forging round, making their own signature 'can mai' blades for the chance to compete against one of our titans of the forge.

programme.title: Hot As Hell
programme.desc: With the heat reaching 126 degrees, King of the Swamp Troy relies on his ingenuity to find the coolest water in the bayou. Jacob risks losing his entire day's catch as he runs his lines in reverse.

programme.title: A Bead On The Target
programme.desc: While the team continues to hunt down the legendary Chappell Vault in the Money Pit, new structures are uncovered in the mysterious swamp that strengthen a developing theory.

programme.title: The Treasure Within
programme.desc: Jeff and his team's search for the wrecks of Mary, Joseph, and Neptune takes them further into uncharted territory. Jeff begins to suspect he may be on the verge of uncovering a field of stolen treasure.

programme.title: Grenada
programme.desc: Josie Gibson flies to a boutique resort in Grenada by the sea, getting her own personal chef and masseuse. Then she sneaks in a Paris trip to indulge her cravings for macarons.

programme.title: Special Occasions
programme.desc: Rachel celebrates the indulgent side of chocolate. She creates a luxurious chocolate mousse with a twist, and adds a chocolatey take to a pasta dish, cacio e pepe.

programme.title: Barber Shop, Buckinghamshire
programme.desc: George meets Olivia and Rollo who are converting an old barbershop into a beautiful new home.

programme.title: Junior Bake Off (S5)
programme.desc: The remaining junior bakers' building skills are tested in Construction Day. For the technical challenge the bakers make a cake that's intentionally the wrong way up.

programme.desc: Nigella introduces us to her love of Italian food through a spectacular yet simple Sicilian pasta with tomatoes, garlic and almonds.

programme.title: Nostalgic Nights In
programme.desc: Taking inspiration from the recipes he grew up with, Donal shares some firm family favourites that would be a hit in any household. For those who like a big bite, he’s got the ultimate steak sandwich, using Donal’s favourite cut for speedy dinners.

programme.title: Dumplins & Bao Buns

programme.title: Jamie's Money Saving Meals (S1)
programme.desc: Jamie elevates bargain veggies in an Indian-inspired dosa, makes a DIY crispy breadcrumbed chicken takeaway, creates an oozy barley risotto and finishes off with thrifty choc-orange shortbreads.

programme.title: Jamie's Money Saving Meals (S1)
programme.desc: Jamie gets frugal with leftovers as he makes spaghetti frittata, rustles up pork pies in the air fryer and whips up thrifty mint choc chip whoopie pies.

programme.title: Jamie's Money Saving Meals (S1)
programme.desc: In this episode, Jamie makes stuffed Dumplings, Blondie cake, Pork Belly Tacos and Pineapple Tarte Tatin with a take out cheat - fish and chips. Guest cook is Gennaro Contaldo who makes a Beef Mince Ragu

programme.title: Jamie's Money Saving Meals (S1)
programme.desc: Jamie makes a delicious soup using discounted veg that's on the turn, an easy cheesy soda bread, a money-saving DIY takeaway chicken burger, and old-school iced buns with low-cost dough.

programme.title: Jamie's Money Saving Meals (S1)
programme.desc: Jamie makes an Italian-inspired pepper stew, a deliciously thrifty roast chicken dish, low-cost DIY takeaway kebabs and air-fried stuffed apples with custard.

programme.title: Jamie's Money Saving Meals (S1)
programme.desc: Jamie rustles up a budget-friendly roast feta pasta, a lip-smacking carrot cake, cost-cutting chicken curry, wallet-friendly Welsh rarebit and thrifty stuffed pancakes.

programme.title: Family Get-Togethers
programme.desc: Nadiya creates dishes ideal for family get-togethers, learns how to perfect her BBQ technique with BBQ-King James, and meets Paul Ainsworth, Michelin Star Chef.

programme.title: Burgundy
programme.desc: Fred and Michael Caines MBE check out Burgundy's best bites at La Cote d'Or, before enjoying a farm-to-fork experience in the Ouche Valley and some of Beaune's patisserie perfection.

programme.title: Finland and Sweden
programme.desc: Josie Gibson heads to Finland and Sweden, flying Business, with its fully flat reclining seats, before enjoying gourmet food, a campfire, a floating sauna, plus helicopter and speedboat rides.

programme.title: Railway Goods Shed, Gloucestershire
programme.desc: George Clarke meets Marcus and Katheryn who are converting a huge Victorian goods shed into a beautiful new home for their family.

programme.title: The Great British Sewing Bee (S11)
programme.desc: It's week 4, and we're celebrating Korea with sewing challenges inspired by the jeogori, tae kwon do and cheollik.

programme.title: All Tracks Lead to Rome
programme.desc: Thomas is working on the Italian Railway, keen to prove to his new friend Gina that he is an expert in all things Italian.

programme.title: Mayor Stan
programme.desc: Myrtle declares Stanley Mayor for a day. He soon finds there is a dance class and new barn to open with lots of ribbon cutting, and he even fits in making a Bowling alley.

programme.title: Sleepover
programme.desc: Stanley helps Hettie with a sleepover at the museum for some of the children. They do a treasure hunt and a night-time picnic, but antics ensue when they clean up after themselves.

programme.title: I Like Jellyfish, Because they Jiggle
programme.desc: The funny little animals talk us through all their favourite creatures.

programme.title: It's time to find a butterfly
programme.desc: JoJo searches for a butterfly to complete her nature tick-book. She learns that all butterflies start life as furry little caterpillars.

programme.title: Cricket
programme.desc: During a friendly game of neighbourhood cricket, the dads struggle to bowl Rusty out.

programme.title: Bedroom
programme.desc: Chilli and Bandit transform the old nursery into a new bedroom for Bluey. In the process, Bluey and Bingo amicably divide their belongings, but get absorbed by trading items and swapping notes at bedtime. Ultimately, when Bluey misses her sister, she asks to return to her old room.

programme.title: Obstacle Course
programme.desc: Chilli sets up an obstacle course in the backyard, but Bluey is disheartened when Bandit turns it into a race and beats her. After cheating in a rematch, Bluey discovers the importance of training in order to improve her skills.

programme.title: The Tooth Brushing Badge
programme.desc: Duggee and the Squirrels meet a lion with unfortunate breath.

programme.title: 风云对话 (III)
programme.desc: 本访谈节目围绕国际焦点事件，叱咤风云的重量级人物，专访全球政治最关键，最敏感的人物，通过阮次山先生的访问，让重量级人物透露决策内幕，剖析心路历程，分析形势发展。

programme.title: 天命
programme.desc: 和珅(陈展鹏)相中皇子永琰(谭俊彦)为皇帝。乾隆驾崩后，嘉庆帝说服和珅儿子丰绅殷德(何广沛)以及心腹福长安(陈山聪)倒戈，意图歼灭和珅及其党羽。然而和珅早有对策，不但化解嘉庆攻击；更反客为主，揭出皇贵妃(李施嬅)秘密，令嘉庆腹背受敌！_x000D__x000D_和珅二夫人长媚(姚子羚)和红颜知己豆蔻(唐诗咏)亦分头行事，令嘉庆亲弟永璘(张颕康)与之反目成仇，而白莲教也在江湖上兴风作浪，令嘉庆陷入绝境。岂料天命难违……

programme.title: 酒店风云
programme.desc: 酒店大亨王玉廷离世后，王家随即掀起一场争产战，叁子启杰(吴卓羲)离家出走，杰母遭两位同父异母的兄长迫走。更甚者，杰此时发现父亲早已将名下酒店股份转给了一个名叫高峰(马德钟)的人！_x000D__x000D_ 原来峰是为报仇而来，誓要将酒店得到手。危城告急，叁兄弟将个人恩怨放下，更不惜拉拢对王家产业一直虎视眈眈的舅父郑永发(姜大伟)连手对付峰。惟峰为人心狠手辣，众人被逐一打垮。_x000D__x000D_ 峰在王氏集团的地位稳如泰山之际，赫然发现女友顾碧琦(郭可盈)走近自己原来别有用心……

programme.title: 酒店风云
programme.desc: 酒店大亨王玉廷离世后，王家随即掀起一场争产战，叁子启杰(吴卓羲)离家出走，杰母遭两位同父异母的兄长迫走。更甚者，杰此时发现父亲早已将名下酒店股份转给了一个名叫高峰(马德钟)的人！_x000D__x000D_ 原来峰是为报仇而来，誓要将酒店得到手。危城告急，叁兄弟将个人恩怨放下，更不惜拉拢对王家产业一直虎视眈眈的舅父郑永发(姜大伟)连手对付峰。惟峰为人心狠手辣，众人被逐一打垮。_x000D__x000D_ 峰在王氏集团的地位稳如泰山之际，赫然发现女友顾碧琦(郭可盈)走近自己原来别有用心……

programme.title: 味想天开
programme.desc: 大唐盛世，丁一山因拥有「金舌头」成为「地狱食评家」，与名厨盖兆天亦敌亦友，还同时爱上爽朗胡姬石柔，遂互斗厨艺，「味」分高下……一山无意间发现自己身世，原来生父含冤而死，兆天父子也有嫌疑，如何为父雪冤？

programme.title: 公主嫁到
programme.desc: 刁蛮任性的昭阳公主(佘诗曼)为避嫁吐蕃急招驸马，一代金店掌舵人丁来喜(关菊英)主动送上门，因二儿子金多禄(陈豪)及叁儿子金多寿(黄浩然)均属单身，希望藉此解决金店面临的财困危机。兄弟情深，多禄为救家业，主动答应亲事。谁料公主过门后尽显骄横跋扈本色，要求金家上下向她行君臣之礼，金家至高的精神领袖金太夫人(李香琴)也难逃一劫，公主的心腹侍婢司徒银屏(陈法拉)更不可一世，尊卑不分，连官媒丁有维(马国明)也不放眼内；金家各人不甘受屈，合力反抗，但金家出名的大力丫环吴四德(钟嘉欣)却倒戈相向，与公主站在同一阵线。公主斗驸马，叁合叁离，各施各法，最后更闹上皇宫，要由太宗亲自平息风波……娶得皇帝女，当然想夫凭妻贵；但娶着这位野蛮公主，又岂能百忍成金？

programme.title: 法言人
programme.desc: 金秉信(马国明饰)本是法律系高材生，却因一次冤狱而决定开启法律行政人员之路。凭借八面玲珑的处事手腕，秉信逐渐建立「金师爷」的金漆招牌。金师爷任职的律师楼突然面临倒闭，他运用人脉化解危局，还获律师田佑家(林夏薇饰)、庾国栋(黄嘉乐饰)加盟共事，并与大状马玮雄(张颕康饰)组成新的法律界「最强CP」，解决各宗错综复杂的案件。及后，金师爷竟再度成为犯人栏内的被告，纵得叁位知心好友全力支持，庭上仍处下风。到底金师爷一方最终能否逆转官司，继续以法律发言，为公义发声？

programme.title: 天命
programme.desc: 和珅(陈展鹏)相中皇子永琰(谭俊彦)为皇帝。乾隆驾崩后，嘉庆帝说服和珅儿子丰绅殷德(何广沛)以及心腹福长安(陈山聪)倒戈，意图歼灭和珅及其党羽。然而和珅早有对策，不但化解嘉庆攻击；更反客为主，揭出皇贵妃(李施嬅)秘密，令嘉庆腹背受敌！_x000D__x000D_和珅二夫人长媚(姚子羚)和红颜知己豆蔻(唐诗咏)亦分头行事，令嘉庆亲弟永璘(张颕康)与之反目成仇，而白莲教也在江湖上兴风作浪，令嘉庆陷入绝境。岂料天命难违……

programme.desc: 酒店大亨王玉廷离世后，王家随即掀起一场争产战，叁子启杰(吴卓羲)离家出走，杰母遭两位同父异母的兄长迫走。更甚者，杰此时发现父亲早已将名下酒店股份转给了一个名叫高峰(马德钟)的人！_x000D__x000D_ 原来峰是为报仇而来，誓要将酒店得到手。危城告急，叁兄弟将个人恩怨放下，更不惜拉拢对王家产业一直虎视眈眈的舅父郑永发(姜大伟)连手对付峰。惟峰为人心狠手辣，众人被逐一打垮。_x000D__x000D_ 峰在王氏集团的地位稳如泰山之际，赫然发现女友顾碧琦(郭可盈)走近自己原来别有用心……

programme.title: 酒店风云
programme.desc: 酒店大亨王玉廷离世后，王家随即掀起一场争产战，叁子启杰(吴卓羲)离家出走，杰母遭两位同父异母的兄长迫走。更甚者，杰此时发现父亲早已将名下酒店股份转给了一个名叫高峰(马德钟)的人！_x000D__x000D_ 原来峰是为报仇而来，誓要将酒店得到手。危城告急，叁兄弟将个人恩怨放下，更不惜拉拢对王家产业一直虎视眈眈的舅父郑永发(姜大伟)连手对付峰。惟峰为人心狠手辣，众人被逐一打垮。_x000D__x000D_ 峰在王氏集团的地位稳如泰山之际，赫然发现女友顾碧琦(郭可盈)走近自己原来别有用心……

programme.title: 味想天开
programme.desc: 大唐盛世，丁一山因拥有「金舌头」成为「地狱食评家」，与名厨盖兆天亦敌亦友，还同时爱上爽朗胡姬石柔，遂互斗厨艺，「味」分高下……一山无意间发现自己身世，原来生父含冤而死，兆天父子也有嫌疑，如何为父雪冤？

programme.title: 公主嫁到
programme.desc: 刁蛮任性的昭阳公主(佘诗曼)为避嫁吐蕃急招驸马，一代金店掌舵人丁来喜(关菊英)主动送上门，因二儿子金多禄(陈豪)及叁儿子金多寿(黄浩然)均属单身，希望藉此解决金店面临的财困危机。兄弟情深，多禄为救家业，主动答应亲事。谁料公主过门后尽显骄横跋扈本色，要求金家上下向她行君臣之礼，金家至高的精神领袖金太夫人(李香琴)也难逃一劫，公主的心腹侍婢司徒银屏(陈法拉)更不可一世，尊卑不分，连官媒丁有维(马国明)也不放眼内；金家各人不甘受屈，合力反抗，但金家出名的大力丫环吴四德(钟嘉欣)却倒戈相向，与公主站在同一阵线。公主斗驸马，叁合叁离，各施各法，最后更闹上皇宫，要由太宗亲自平息风波……娶得皇帝女，当然想夫凭妻贵；但娶着这位野蛮公主，又岂能百忍成金？

programme.title: 法言人
programme.desc: 金秉信(马国明饰)本是法律系高材生，却因一次冤狱而决定开启法律行政人员之路。凭借八面玲珑的处事手腕，秉信逐渐建立「金师爷」的金漆招牌。金师爷任职的律师楼突然面临倒闭，他运用人脉化解危局，还获律师田佑家(林夏薇饰)、庾国栋(黄嘉乐饰)加盟共事，并与大状马玮雄(张颕康饰)组成新的法律界「最强CP」，解决各宗错综复杂的案件。及后，金师爷竟再度成为犯人栏内的被告，纵得叁位知心好友全力支持，庭上仍处下风。到底金师爷一方最终能否逆转官司，继续以法律发言，为公义发声？

programme.title: 天命
programme.desc: 和珅(陈展鹏)相中皇子永琰(谭俊彦)为皇帝。乾隆驾崩后，嘉庆帝说服和珅儿子丰绅殷德(何广沛)以及心腹福长安(陈山聪)倒戈，意图歼灭和珅及其党羽。然而和珅早有对策，不但化解嘉庆攻击；更反客为主，揭出皇贵妃(李施嬅)秘密，令嘉庆腹背受敌！_x000D__x000D_和珅二夫人长媚(姚子羚)和红颜知己豆蔻(唐诗咏)亦分头行事，令嘉庆亲弟永璘(张颕康)与之反目成仇，而白莲教也在江湖上兴风作浪，令嘉庆陷入绝境。岂料天命难违……

programme.title: 酒店风云
programme.desc: 酒店大亨王玉廷离世后，王家随即掀起一场争产战，叁子启杰(吴卓羲)离家出走，杰母遭两位同父异母的兄长迫走。更甚者，杰此时发现父亲早已将名下酒店股份转给了一个名叫高峰(马德钟)的人！_x000D__x000D_ 原来峰是为报仇而来，誓要将酒店得到手。危城告急，叁兄弟将个人恩怨放下，更不惜拉拢对王家产业一直虎视眈眈的舅父郑永发(姜大伟)连手对付峰。惟峰为人心狠手辣，众人被逐一打垮。_x000D__x000D_ 峰在王氏集团的地位稳如泰山之际，赫然发现女友顾碧琦(郭可盈)走近自己原来别有用心……

programme.desc: 刁蛮任性的昭阳公主(佘诗曼)为避嫁吐蕃急招驸马，一代金店掌舵人丁来喜(关菊英)主动送上门，因二儿子金多禄(陈豪)及叁儿子金多寿(黄浩然)均属单身，希望藉此解决金店面临的财困危机。兄弟情深，多禄为救家业，主动答应亲事。谁料公主过门后尽显骄横跋扈本色，要求金家上下向她行君臣之礼，金家至高的精神领袖金太夫人(李香琴)也难逃一劫，公主的心腹侍婢司徒银屏(陈法拉)更不可一世，尊卑不分，连官媒丁有维(马国明)也不放眼内；金家各人不甘受屈，合力反抗，但金家出名的大力丫环吴四德(钟嘉欣)却倒戈相向，与公主站在同一阵线。公主斗驸马，叁合叁离，各施各法，最后更闹上皇宫，要由太宗亲自平息风波……娶得皇帝女，当然想夫凭妻贵；但娶着这位野蛮公主，又岂能百忍成金？

programme.title: 法言人
programme.desc: 金秉信(马国明饰)本是法律系高材生，却因一次冤狱而决定开启法律行政人员之路。凭借八面玲珑的处事手腕，秉信逐渐建立「金师爷」的金漆招牌。金师爷任职的律师楼突然面临倒闭，他运用人脉化解危局，还获律师田佑家(林夏薇饰)、庾国栋(黄嘉乐饰)加盟共事，并与大状马玮雄(张颕康饰)组成新的法律界「最强CP」，解决各宗错综复杂的案件。及后，金师爷竟再度成为犯人栏内的被告，纵得叁位知心好友全力支持，庭上仍处下风。到底金师爷一方最终能否逆转官司，继续以法律发言，为公义发声？

programme.title: 天命
programme.desc: 和珅(陈展鹏)相中皇子永琰(谭俊彦)为皇帝。乾隆驾崩后，嘉庆帝说服和珅儿子丰绅殷德(何广沛)以及心腹福长安(陈山聪)倒戈，意图歼灭和珅及其党羽。然而和珅早有对策，不但化解嘉庆攻击；更反客为主，揭出皇贵妃(李施嬅)秘密，令嘉庆腹背受敌！_x000D__x000D_和珅二夫人长媚(姚子羚)和红颜知己豆蔻(唐诗咏)亦分头行事，令嘉庆亲弟永璘(张颕康)与之反目成仇，而白莲教也在江湖上兴风作浪，令嘉庆陷入绝境。岂料天命难违……

programme.title: 酒店风云
programme.desc: 酒店大亨王玉廷离世后，王家随即掀起一场争产战，叁子启杰(吴卓羲)离家出走，杰母遭两位同父异母的兄长迫走。更甚者，杰此时发现父亲早已将名下酒店股份转给了一个名叫高峰(马德钟)的人！_x000D__x000D_ 原来峰是为报仇而来，誓要将酒店得到手。危城告急，叁兄弟将个人恩怨放下，更不惜拉拢对王家产业一直虎视眈眈的舅父郑永发(姜大伟)连手对付峰。惟峰为人心狠手辣，众人被逐一打垮。_x000D__x000D_ 峰在王氏集团的地位稳如泰山之际，赫然发现女友顾碧琦(郭可盈)走近自己原来别有用心……

programme.title: 酒店风云
programme.desc: 酒店大亨王玉廷离世后，王家随即掀起一场争产战，叁子启杰(吴卓羲)离家出走，杰母遭两位同父异母的兄长迫走。更甚者，杰此时发现父亲早已将名下酒店股份转给了一个名叫高峰(马德钟)的人！_x000D__x000D_ 原来峰是为报仇而来，誓要将酒店得到手。危城告急，叁兄弟将个人恩怨放下，更不惜拉拢对王家产业一直虎视眈眈的舅父郑永发(姜大伟)连手对付峰。惟峰为人心狠手辣，众人被逐一打垮。_x000D__x000D_ 峰在王氏集团的地位稳如泰山之际，赫然发现女友顾碧琦(郭可盈)走近自己原来别有用心……

programme.title: 味想天开
programme.desc: 大唐盛世，丁一山因拥有「金舌头」成为「地狱食评家」，与名厨盖兆天亦敌亦友，还同时爱上爽朗胡姬石柔，遂互斗厨艺，「味」分高下……一山无意间发现自己身世，原来生父含冤而死，兆天父子也有嫌疑，如何为父雪冤？

programme.title: 公主嫁到
programme.desc: 刁蛮任性的昭阳公主(佘诗曼)为避嫁吐蕃急招驸马，一代金店掌舵人丁来喜(关菊英)主动送上门，因二儿子金多禄(陈豪)及叁儿子金多寿(黄浩然)均属单身，希望藉此解决金店面临的财困危机。兄弟情深，多禄为救家业，主动答应亲事。谁料公主过门后尽显骄横跋扈本色，要求金家上下向她行君臣之礼，金家至高的精神领袖金太夫人(李香琴)也难逃一劫，公主的心腹侍婢司徒银屏(陈法拉)更不可一世，尊卑不分，连官媒丁有维(马国明)也不放眼内；金家各人不甘受屈，合力反抗，但金家出名的大力丫环吴四德(钟嘉欣)却倒戈相向，与公主站在同一阵线。公主斗驸马，叁合叁离，各施各法，最后更闹上皇宫，要由太宗亲自平息风波……娶得皇帝女，当然想夫凭妻贵；但娶着这位野蛮公主，又岂能百忍成金？

programme.title: 酒店风云
programme.desc: 酒店大亨王玉廷离世后，王家随即掀起一场争产战，叁子启杰(吴卓羲)离家出走，杰母遭两位同父异母的兄长迫走。更甚者，杰此时发现父亲早已将名下酒店股份转给了一个名叫高峰(马德钟)的人！_x000D__x000D_ 原来峰是为报仇而来，誓要将酒店得到手。危城告急，叁兄弟将个人恩怨放下，更不惜拉拢对王家产业一直虎视眈眈的舅父郑永发(姜大伟)连手对付峰。惟峰为人心狠手辣，众人被逐一打垮。_x000D__x000D_ 峰在王氏集团的地位稳如泰山之际，赫然发现女友顾碧琦(郭可盈)走近自己原来别有用心……

programme.title: 地狱天使
programme.desc: 年轻貌美的儿（张可颐），牵涉毒杀富翁及争夺遗产，找来石（陈启泰）当其辩护律师。儿的背景神秘复杂，且于有意无意间对石作出挑逗，令石留下深刻印象。_x000D__x000D_原来儿为石妻珊（苏玉华）之同父异母姐妹。儿因痛恨珊母当年抢走其父，致儿母沦为妓女，儿更惨遭嫖客强奸。儿誓要向珊母女二人进行报复。儿接近石，是为要珊婚姻决裂，家破人亡。_x000D__x000D_在儿的精心布局下，石渐转投其怀抱。儿见目标已达，欲抽身离去，却惊觉自己爱上了石。此时，儿情人关（何英伟）利用儿陷害石作其替死鬼，以掩饰其商业罪行……

programme.title: 锦绣良缘
programme.desc: 程家世代经营染布业，程父与元配早逝，程二太太上官丹凤﹝黄淑仪﹞一直当家作主，把家业打理得井井有条。_x000D__x000D_长子智盛﹝罗莽﹞性格戆直，娶得贤妻周梦娴﹝苏玉华﹞。次子智博﹝阮兆祥﹞为人急功近利，和锱铢必较的妻子薛小小﹝郭少芸﹞是对欢喜冤家。叁子智勇﹝郑中基﹞心地善良但只管吃喝玩乐，其妻郑艳﹝梅小惠﹞为人势利却爱夫心切。四子智轩博学多闻、温文尔雅，却要奉皇上圣旨跟率性不羁的吐蕃女子顿珠﹝文颂娴﹞成婚。智轩和顿珠性格迥异，时有争执，二人不但无夫妻之实，而且常常斗气，因而闹出不少笑话来。期间，智轩爱上女子周梦诗﹝邝文珣﹞，顿珠大方地从中撮合，智轩心存感激。及后梦诗移情别恋，智轩若有所失，顿珠从旁安慰，二人竟又渐生情愫。程家因得罪权贵而尽失祖业，智轩更因一个惊人的秘密而惹来杀身之祸……

programme.title: 点金胜手
programme.desc: 高端智能人阿宝(李佳芯饰)出厂时意外走失，流落人间，落入古怪寻常百姓家。人工智能公司职员古家廉(陆永饰)如获至宝，私下将阿宝据为己有。阿宝为协助古家四名家族成员执行各项奇怪任务，启动自我学习功能，自此尝尽人间百味的七情六欲，更爱上了主人家廉，体会情为何物。公司高层兼情敌多姐(冯盈盈饰)在公在私对阿宝穷追不舍，誓要把她彻底销毁！与此同时，阿宝却侦测到自己身中计算机病毒，生命正在倒数……

programme.title: 智能爱人
programme.desc: 高端智能人阿宝(李佳芯饰)出厂时意外走失，流落人间，落入古怪寻常百姓家。人工智能公司职员古家廉(陆永饰)如获至宝，私下将阿宝据为己有。阿宝为协助古家四名家族成员执行各项奇怪任务，启动自我学习功能，自此尝尽人间百味的七情六欲，更爱上了主人家廉，体会情为何物。公司高层兼情敌多姐(冯盈盈饰)在公在私对阿宝穷追不舍，誓要把她彻底销毁！与此同时，阿宝却侦测到自己身中计算机病毒，生命正在倒数……

programme.title: 争霸
programme.desc: 春秋战国时代，各路诸侯各据一方。多少奇情，都在那个充满变数的处境里一一展示。范蠡(陈坤)、勾践(刘松仁)和夫差(马德钟)叁人之间长达二十多年的斗智斗力 ─ 侠骨丹心的范蠡、卧薪尝胆的勾践、一代枭雄的夫差、还有倾国倾城的大美人西施(郭羡妮)……_x000D__x000D_二千五百多年前的故事看似遥远，但当中主角那份对理想的坚持，不屈不朽的精神，可歌可泣的故事，传诵至今，仍为人津津乐道。

programme.title: 争霸
programme.desc: 春秋战国时代，各路诸侯各据一方。多少奇情，都在那个充满变数的处境里一一展示。范蠡(陈坤)、勾践(刘松仁)和夫差(马德钟)叁人之间长达二十多年的斗智斗力 ─ 侠骨丹心的范蠡、卧薪尝胆的勾践、一代枭雄的夫差、还有倾国倾城的大美人西施(郭羡妮)……_x000D__x000D_二千五百多年前的故事看似遥远，但当中主角那份对理想的坚持，不屈不朽的精神，可歌可泣的故事，传诵至今，仍为人津津乐道。

programme.title: 巨塔之后
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】一妍、英杰带队出席交流会，途中被掳走，原来于永成提议下，鍈伟下令掳走一妍等人上货船驶出公海，替其父亲做肝脏移植手术。本为心胸外科的一妍临危受命完成手术，众人获释。关于坠机事故，一妍对方欣明言，怀疑方欣嫉妒进涛与自己结婚而狠下毒手。海淳关切的病人何太终告不治，海淳极为难过，更归咎于以珈置身事外，纵容明塱内斗，导致悲剧发生。

programme.title: 星河长明
programme.desc: 七海伶和界诸婴为了躲避左近天的追杀，选择带领族人穿越危险的夜沼前往越州。在途中，他们遇到了困难，但最终通过与土伯的交易成功穿越。然而，到达营地时发现夜北族人被左近天抓走，七海伶和界诸婴为救族人分别被擒。另一方面，叶凌霜因与翼无忧私下见面被樊如晦设计陷害，被彧修明关入天牢，后因其能缓解彧修明的头痛被冷天曦放出。

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: ７人的復活
programme.desc: 承接上季《7人的逃脱》剧情，讲述了在假新闻成就的城堡里梦想成为帝王的男人和逃离邪恶的7人的反击。

programme.title: 宴遇永安
programme.desc: 现代少女沈韶光（王影璐饰）与家人意外穿越至永安城，通过经营小饭馆结识京兆少尹林晏（李昀锐饰），以未婚妻身份化解危机后入住其府邸云水苑，展开融合美食经营、市井民俗的爱情。

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 故事主要围绕“熊氏一家”在家中的生活点滴和工作上的繁忙。

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: 巨塔之后
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】一妍、英杰带队出席交流会，途中被掳走，原来于永成提议下，鍈伟下令掳走一妍等人上货船驶出公海，替其父亲做肝脏移植手术。本为心胸外科的一妍临危受命完成手术，众人获释。关于坠机事故，一妍对方欣明言，怀疑方欣嫉妒进涛与自己结婚而狠下毒手。海淳关切的病人何太终告不治，海淳极为难过，更归咎于以珈置身事外，纵容明塱内斗，导致悲剧发生。

programme.title: 逍遥
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】讲述了生性洒脱的少女肖瑶（谭松韵饰）误入万妖谷引发风波，与万妖之王红烨（侯明昊饰）共同卷入神秘怪案。

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 故事主要围绕“熊氏一家”在家中的生活点滴和工作上的繁忙。

programme.title: 星河长明
programme.desc: 七海伶和界诸婴为了躲避左近天的追杀，选择带领族人穿越危险的夜沼前往越州。在途中，他们遇到了困难，但最终通过与土伯的交易成功穿越。然而，到达营地时发现夜北族人被左近天抓走，七海伶和界诸婴为救族人分别被擒。另一方面，叶凌霜因与翼无忧私下见面被樊如晦设计陷害，被彧修明关入天牢，后因其能缓解彧修明的头痛被冷天曦放出。

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: 台风的新娘
programme.desc: 虽然殷瑞妍并不富有，但大家都知道她有一颗温暖的心。 有一天，她发现自己一直称为父亲的姜白山，居然是自己亲生父母的仇敌。 殷瑞妍的复仇行动渐渐开始展开……

programme.title: 台风的新娘
programme.desc: 虽然殷瑞妍并不富有，但大家都知道她有一颗温暖的心。 有一天，她发现自己一直称为父亲的姜白山，居然是自己亲生父母的仇敌。 殷瑞妍的复仇行动渐渐开始展开……

programme.title: 宴遇永安
programme.desc: 现代少女沈韶光（王影璐饰）与家人意外穿越至永安城，通过经营小饭馆结识京兆少尹林晏（李昀锐饰），以未婚妻身份化解危机后入住其府邸云水苑，展开融合美食经营、市井民俗的爱情。

programme.title: 黑色月光
programme.desc: 慧云出席名媛界的慈善会议，听到公关林美琪嘲笑她，使计辞退美琪，改聘满月当公关。成风查到第一钢材有问题，奉世祺之命接近基俊。满月担心成风会阻挠基俊与第一钢材签约，故意公开哲贤病重消息，再使计令成风失约于基俊。成风始料不及，想细问满月，满月却忽然胃痛被送院，漫星、曦晨赶到医院见成风甚为关心满月……哲贤身体状态转差，满月怀疑有人暗中下毒… …永源向基俊求财，却被侮辱。

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 故事主要围绕“熊氏一家”在家中的生活点滴和工作上的繁忙。

programme.title: 宴遇永安
programme.desc: 现代少女沈韶光（王影璐饰）与家人意外穿越至永安城，通过经营小饭馆结识京兆少尹林晏（李昀锐饰），以未婚妻身份化解危机后入住其府邸云水苑，展开融合美食经营、市井民俗的爱情。

programme.title: 巨塔之后
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】以珈于德桥帮助下加入明塱董事局，一妍怀疑德桥别有用心。国际刑警进一步证实，进涛坠机是人为。明塱新收患重度先天性角化不全症的女童，一妍坚持要为病童进行风险极高的活体肺肝同步移植手术。明塱多年前曾施行同一手术，却因失误导致病人死亡，负责手术的董立万医生引咎离职。

programme.title: 逍遥
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】讲述了生性洒脱的少女肖瑶（谭松韵饰）误入万妖谷引发风波，与万妖之王红烨（侯明昊饰）共同卷入神秘怪案。

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 故事主要围绕“熊氏一家”在家中的生活点滴和工作上的繁忙。

programme.title: 星河长明
programme.desc: 冷天曦发现彧修明对叶凌霜有特殊情感，叶凌霜因被误解与翼无忧有染而被彧修明关入天牢，后因其能缓解彧修明的头痛被冷天曦放出。同时，左近天因抗旨并试图杀害界诸婴和七海伶，引发彧修明的愤怒。彧修明采取措施逼迫左近天，并处理了与左近天有牵连的樊家。另一方面，叶凌霜为了解开封印，在得到彧修明的许可后闭关静修三天。

programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: 微雨燕双飞
programme.desc: 荆国安平初年少年皇帝即位，战事纷涌，民不聊生。六品官员白文泰的侄女茉喜（张楠饰）与掌上明珠凤瑶（王玉雯饰）意外被卷进了是非之中。

programme.title: 一念关山
programme.desc: 讲述安国朱衣卫前左使任如意（刘诗诗饰）因机缘巧合成为梧国迎帝使小分队成员，和梧国六道堂堂主宁远舟（刘宇宁饰）等人经历生死，共同成长的故事。

programme.title: 一念关山
programme.desc: 讲述安国朱衣卫前左使任如意（刘诗诗饰）因机缘巧合成为梧国迎帝使小分队成员，和梧国六道堂堂主宁远舟（刘宇宁饰）等人经历生死，共同成长的故事。

programme.title: 巨塔之后
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】一妍成功进入董事会之外，路沙马集团主席方欣亦成为新董事；方欣更直接向一妍宣战。一妍再次要求以珈、丽雪入董事会，惟以珈仍坚决拒绝。明塱医院爆出医疗事故，丽雪的弟弟陈宇泽牵涉其中。丽雪帮忙拆局时，发现事件背后大有文章……以珈心系继女王海淳的前途，希望海淳按照启聪遗愿，前赴英国升读大学，但海淳坚拒不从，二人闹翻。

programme.title: 巨塔之后
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】医疗事故越闹越大，副院长英杰更有利益输送之嫌。方欣为了让英杰在董事会投她一票于背后操控事件；一妍看准以珈的正义感，放消息让以珈介入医疗事故。以珈得知海淳到了首尔，立即飞抵当地，成功救了遇险的海淳。以珈与受了伤的海淳回港，以珈对前来探望的一妍大兴问罪……

programme.title: 巨塔之后
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】建邦告知启澄，传染病事件是永成搞鬼。明塱众多医生被强制隔离，手术被延误，顿时陷入混乱！一妍分身于各手术室，尽力拯救病人。方欣往找永成，提出条件要求他收手……永成的重要客户林鍈伟是泰国有势力人士，其父亲患肝病急需换肝，永成别有用心，给鍈伟提出方法。海淳要求以珈接手一宗医疗诉讼，为在分娩时遇上隔离事件、导致状况垂危的何太，控告明塱！

programme.title: 巨塔之后
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】一妍、英杰带队出席交流会，途中被掳走，原来于永成提议下，鍈伟下令掳走一妍等人上货船驶出公海，替其父亲做肝脏移植手术。本为心胸外科的一妍临危受命完成手术，众人获释。关于坠机事故，一妍对方欣明言，怀疑方欣嫉妒进涛与自己结婚而狠下毒手。海淳关切的病人何太终告不治，海淳极为难过，更归咎于以珈置身事外，纵容明塱内斗，导致悲剧发生。

programme.title: 巨塔之后
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】以珈于德桥帮助下加入明塱董事局，一妍怀疑德桥别有用心。国际刑警进一步证实，进涛坠机是人为。明塱新收患重度先天性角化不全症的女童，一妍坚持要为病童进行风险极高的活体肺肝同步移植手术。明塱多年前曾施行同一手术，却因失误导致病人死亡，负责手术的董立万医生引咎离职。

programme.title: 荣誉:她们的法庭
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】三位律师挚友在专为女性受害者辩护的律所中，面对20年前秘密重现。她们展现钢铁般的团结，直面过去阴影，守护正义与彼此。

programme.title: 陪玩的女人
programme.desc: 剧情讲述清洗了黑暗过去的大哥至焕（严泰九饰）和陪孩子们玩的米妮姐姐（韩善伙饰）银河之间满是反转和心动的爱情故事。

programme.title: 人之初
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】一起撞车事件暴露出一具埋藏多年的尸骨，将孤儿高风（张若昀饰）与富家女吴飞飞（马思纯饰）紧紧缠绕在一起。为破解身世之谜 ，他们携手合作配合警方共同挖清这座城市的陈年黑暗。

programme.title: 人之初

programme.title: 星河长明
programme.desc: 七海伶和界诸婴为了躲避左近天的追杀，选择带领族人穿越危险的夜沼前往越州。在途中，他们遇到了困难，但最终通过与土伯的交易成功穿越。然而，到达营地时发现夜北族人被左近天抓走，七海伶和界诸婴为救族人分别被擒。另一方面，叶凌霜因与翼无忧私下见面被樊如晦设计陷害，被彧修明关入天牢，后因其能缓解彧修明的头痛被冷天曦放出。

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: ７人的復活
programme.desc: 承接上季《7人的逃脱》剧情，讲述了在假新闻成就的城堡里梦想成为帝王的男人和逃离邪恶的7人的反击。

programme.title: 宴遇永安
programme.desc: 现代少女沈韶光（王影璐饰）与家人意外穿越至永安城，通过经营小饭馆结识京兆少尹林晏（李昀锐饰），以未婚妻身份化解危机后入住其府邸云水苑，展开融合美食经营、市井民俗的爱情。

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 故事主要围绕“熊氏一家”在家中的生活点滴和工作上的繁忙。

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: 巨塔之后
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】一妍、英杰带队出席交流会，途中被掳走，原来于永成提议下，鍈伟下令掳走一妍等人上货船驶出公海，替其父亲做肝脏移植手术。本为心胸外科的一妍临危受命完成手术，众人获释。关于坠机事故，一妍对方欣明言，怀疑方欣嫉妒进涛与自己结婚而狠下毒手。海淳关切的病人何太终告不治，海淳极为难过，更归咎于以珈置身事外，纵容明塱内斗，导致悲剧发生。

programme.title: 逍遥
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】讲述了生性洒脱的少女肖瑶（谭松韵饰）误入万妖谷引发风波，与万妖之王红烨（侯明昊饰）共同卷入神秘怪案。

programme.title: 台风的新娘
programme.desc: 虽然殷瑞妍并不富有，但大家都知道她有一颗温暖的心。 有一天，她发现自己一直称为父亲的姜白山，居然是自己亲生父母的仇敌。 殷瑞妍的复仇行动渐渐开始展开……

programme.title: 台风的新娘
programme.desc: 虽然殷瑞妍并不富有，但大家都知道她有一颗温暖的心。 有一天，她发现自己一直称为父亲的姜白山，居然是自己亲生父母的仇敌。 殷瑞妍的复仇行动渐渐开始展开……

programme.title: 宴遇永安
programme.desc: 现代少女沈韶光（王影璐饰）与家人意外穿越至永安城，通过经营小饭馆结识京兆少尹林晏（李昀锐饰），以未婚妻身份化解危机后入住其府邸云水苑，展开融合美食经营、市井民俗的爱情。

programme.title: 黑色月光
programme.desc: 慧云出席名媛界的慈善会议，听到公关林美琪嘲笑她，使计辞退美琪，改聘满月当公关。成风查到第一钢材有问题，奉世祺之命接近基俊。满月担心成风会阻挠基俊与第一钢材签约，故意公开哲贤病重消息，再使计令成风失约于基俊。成风始料不及，想细问满月，满月却忽然胃痛被送院，漫星、曦晨赶到医院见成风甚为关心满月……哲贤身体状态转差，满月怀疑有人暗中下毒… …永源向基俊求财，却被侮辱。

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递

programme.title: 宴遇永安
programme.desc: 现代少女沈韶光（王影璐饰）与家人意外穿越至永安城，通过经营小饭馆结识京兆少尹林晏（李昀锐饰），以未婚妻身份化解危机后入住其府邸云水苑，展开融合美食经营、市井民俗的爱情。

programme.title: 巨塔之后
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】以珈于德桥帮助下加入明塱董事局，一妍怀疑德桥别有用心。国际刑警进一步证实，进涛坠机是人为。明塱新收患重度先天性角化不全症的女童，一妍坚持要为病童进行风险极高的活体肺肝同步移植手术。明塱多年前曾施行同一手术，却因失误导致病人死亡，负责手术的董立万医生引咎离职。

programme.title: 逍遥
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】讲述了生性洒脱的少女肖瑶（谭松韵饰）误入万妖谷引发风波，与万妖之王红烨（侯明昊饰）共同卷入神秘怪案。

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 故事主要围绕“熊氏一家”在家中的生活点滴和工作上的繁忙。

programme.title: 星河长明
programme.desc: 冷天曦发现彧修明对叶凌霜有特殊情感，叶凌霜因被误解与翼无忧有染而被彧修明关入天牢，后因其能缓解彧修明的头痛被冷天曦放出。同时，左近天因抗旨并试图杀害界诸婴和七海伶，引发彧修明的愤怒。彧修明采取措施逼迫左近天，并处理了与左近天有牵连的樊家。另一方面，叶凌霜为了解开封印，在得到彧修明的许可后闭关静修三天。

programme.title: 微雨燕双飞
programme.desc: 荆国安平初年少年皇帝即位，战事纷涌，民不聊生。六品官员白文泰的侄女茉喜（张楠饰）与掌上明珠凤瑶（王玉雯饰）意外被卷进了是非之中。

programme.title: 一念关山
programme.desc: 讲述安国朱衣卫前左使任如意（刘诗诗饰）因机缘巧合成为梧国迎帝使小分队成员，和梧国六道堂堂主宁远舟（刘宇宁饰）等人经历生死，共同成长的故事。

programme.title: 一念关山
programme.desc: 讲述安国朱衣卫前左使任如意（刘诗诗饰）因机缘巧合成为梧国迎帝使小分队成员，和梧国六道堂堂主宁远舟（刘宇宁饰）等人经历生死，共同成长的故事。

programme.title: 巨塔之后
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】一妍成功进入董事会之外，路沙马集团主席方欣亦成为新董事；方欣更直接向一妍宣战。一妍再次要求以珈、丽雪入董事会，惟以珈仍坚决拒绝。明塱医院爆出医疗事故，丽雪的弟弟陈宇泽牵涉其中。丽雪帮忙拆局时，发现事件背后大有文章……以珈心系继女王海淳的前途，希望海淳按照启聪遗愿，前赴英国升读大学，但海淳坚拒不从，二人闹翻。

programme.title: 巨塔之后
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】医疗事故越闹越大，副院长英杰更有利益输送之嫌。方欣为了让英杰在董事会投她一票于背后操控事件；一妍看准以珈的正义感，放消息让以珈介入医疗事故。以珈得知海淳到了首尔，立即飞抵当地，成功救了遇险的海淳。以珈与受了伤的海淳回港，以珈对前来探望的一妍大兴问罪……

programme.title: 巨塔之后
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】建邦告知启澄，传染病事件是永成搞鬼。明塱众多医生被强制隔离，手术被延误，顿时陷入混乱！一妍分身于各手术室，尽力拯救病人。方欣往找永成，提出条件要求他收手……永成的重要客户林鍈伟是泰国有势力人士，其父亲患肝病急需换肝，永成别有用心，给鍈伟提出方法。海淳要求以珈接手一宗医疗诉讼，为在分娩时遇上隔离事件、导致状况垂危的何太，控告明塱！

programme.title: 巨塔之后
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】一妍、英杰带队出席交流会，途中被掳走，原来于永成提议下，鍈伟下令掳走一妍等人上货船驶出公海，替其父亲做肝脏移植手术。本为心胸外科的一妍临危受命完成手术，众人获释。关于坠机事故，一妍对方欣明言，怀疑方欣嫉妒进涛与自己结婚而狠下毒手。海淳关切的病人何太终告不治，海淳极为难过，更归咎于以珈置身事外，纵容明塱内斗，导致悲剧发生。

programme.title: 巨塔之后
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】以珈于德桥帮助下加入明塱董事局，一妍怀疑德桥别有用心。国际刑警进一步证实，进涛坠机是人为。明塱新收患重度先天性角化不全症的女童，一妍坚持要为病童进行风险极高的活体肺肝同步移植手术。明塱多年前曾施行同一手术，却因失误导致病人死亡，负责手术的董立万医生引咎离职。

programme.title: 荣誉:她们的法庭
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】三位律师挚友在专为女性受害者辩护的律所中，面对20年前秘密重现。她们展现钢铁般的团结，直面过去阴影，守护正义与彼此。

programme.title: 陪玩的女人
programme.desc: 剧情讲述清洗了黑暗过去的大哥至焕（严泰九饰）和陪孩子们玩的米妮姐姐（韩善伙饰）银河之间满是反转和心动的爱情故事。

programme.title: 人之初
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】一起撞车事件暴露出一具埋藏多年的尸骨，将孤儿高风（张若昀饰）与富家女吴飞飞（马思纯饰）紧紧缠绕在一起。为破解身世之谜 ，他们携手合作配合警方共同挖清这座城市的陈年黑暗。

programme.desc: Today's theme: Vanishing Tools. As the rising age of artisans puts the survival of certain crafts at risk, we shine a light on the vanishing tools used to keep them alive and their anonymous designs.

programme.title: Frontrunners
programme.desc: Matsumoto Myokei, a 'once-in-a-century' sculptor of Buddhist statues, is passing his skills onto his grandson Shukan - 80 years on from the atomic bomb attacks, Shukan sculpts a message of peace.

programme.title: Asia Insight
programme.desc: A new high-speed rail line has sparked a massive rise in tourism to Laos' historic capital Luang Prabang - it's had a major effect on traditional local life in this UNESCO World Heritage town.

programme.title: Direct Talk
programme.desc: Hosono Hitomi's botanically-themed ceramics are highly acclaimed and held in museum collections across the world - she talks about her intricate designs and unmatched technique.

programme.title: Impacts: Climates Change the World
programme.desc: Global warming leads to widespread famine - by 2100, it is predicted that yields of maize, soybeans and wheat may fall by 30 to 40 per cent. We examine the scientific data on this global issue.

programme.title: Ukiyo-e Edo-Life
programme.desc: Will Sparks Fly?: A young man sits in a teahouse with his older companion when a young woman catches his eye - from the way they're looking at each other, it's clear there's something between them.

programme.title: Medical Frontiers
programme.desc: Two drugs have been approved for their potential to slow the progression of Alzheimer's disease - we look at how they work and report on new findings suggesting a food-derived component may also help.

programme.title: Trailblazers
programme.desc: Tiara designer Kamitani Taro specialises in custom pieces - now working with a newly-developed material, we follow his creative process to see how he puts sparkle into his designs.

programme.title: Design X Stories
programme.desc: Today's theme: Vanishing Tools. As the rising age of artisans puts the survival of certain crafts at risk, we shine a light on the vanishing tools used to keep them alive and their anonymous designs.

programme.title: Asia Insight
programme.desc: A new high-speed rail line has sparked a massive rise in tourism to Laos' historic capital Luang Prabang - it's had a major effect on traditional local life in this UNESCO World Heritage town.

programme.title: Chatroom Japan
programme.desc: All mothers need some 'me time' - that's why one forward-thinking woman in Kyoto established Mamo Heart, a space for mothers to relax and also get their own business ideas off the ground.

programme.title: Japan's Top Inventions
programme.desc: Discover the stories behind renowned Japanese products alongside our reporter. This time: automatic floodgates.

programme.title: Japanology Plus
programme.desc: Johan Leutwiler from Switzerland is currently Japan's only foreign swordsmith - in a Japanophiles interview, he tells us about being drawn to the world of Japanese swords and sword-making.

programme.title: The Isolado Reemerge
programme.desc: The Isolado have re-emerged in the heart of the Amazon - astonishing new footage reveals how these uncontacted people have changed over the last decade.

programme.title: NHK World Showcase
programme.desc: This programme covers a variety of genres, including pilot episodes of newly-developed programmes and special features.

programme.title: Train Cruise
programme.desc: Spring arrives late in eastern Hokkaido - travel from Obihiro through Japan's food base and along the Pacific Ocean to Nemuro. Taste local delicacies, drive a train, and explore the vast marshlands...

programme.title: Japanology Plus mini
programme.desc: Japan is a hot spot for discovering dinosaur fossils - an excavation in Hokkaido sparked a nationwide enthusiasm for dinosaurs and led to entertainment such as dinosaur robots and mechanical suits.

programme.title: Design X Stories
programme.desc: Today's theme: Vanishing Tools. As the rising age of artisans puts the survival of certain crafts at risk, we shine a light on the vanishing tools used to keep them alive and their anonymous designs.

programme.title: Rockie and Her Friends
programme.desc: Puppet action show for children. In a distant post-human future where surviving creatures have formed a community, new-breed dinosaur girl Rockie sets out on hilarious adventures with her schoolmates.

programme.title: Take Tech
programme.desc: A programme for upper primary to lower secondary school children about exploring everyday technologies all around them - each episode takes a piece of familiar tech and finds out what it does and how.

programme.title: Sake Truth
programme.desc: We explore various truths about sake - from the koji that determines the taste to medieval innovations that changed sake-making - and examine the science behind why sake changes flavour when heated.

programme.title: Ukiyo-e Edo-Life
programme.desc: Mornings begin early for fishmongers and vegetable peddlers at Nihonbashi Bridge for a reason - they are not going to bow to the lord's procession in this bustling scene from everyday Edo life.

programme.title: Bosai: Science That Can Save Your Life
programme.desc: The historic city of Kyoto faces threats of landslides and post-earthquake fires - what modern systems defend this ancient city from natural disasters?

programme.title: Kabuki Kool
programme.desc: Actor Kataoka Ainosuke explores the sometimes tragic and occasionally comical relationships between married couples in kabuki; explore these dramatic tales of fidelity and romance.

programme.title: The Isolado Reemerge
programme.desc: The Isolado have re-emerged in the heart of the Amazon - astonishing new footage reveals how these uncontacted people have changed over the last decade.

programme.title: NHK World Showcase
programme.desc: This programme covers a variety of genres, including pilot episodes of newly-developed programmes and special features.

programme.title: Darwin's Amazing Animals
programme.desc: It's the world's fastest land animal, but that rarely helps in Africa's bush where the cheetah thrives. Let's discover some of its amazing hunting techniques, including what looks like teleporting!

programme.title: Rockie and Her Friends
programme.desc: Puppet action show for children. In a distant post-human future where surviving creatures have formed a community, new-breed dinosaur girl Rockie sets out on hilarious adventures with her schoolmates.

programme.title: Take Tech
programme.desc: A programme for upper primary to lower secondary school children about exploring everyday technologies all around them - each episode takes a piece of familiar tech and finds out what it does and how.

programme.title: Train Cruise
programme.desc: Spring arrives late in eastern Hokkaido - travel from Obihiro through Japan's food base and along the Pacific Ocean to Nemuro. Taste local delicacies, drive a train, and explore the vast marshlands...

programme.title: Japanology Plus mini
programme.desc: Japan is a hot spot for discovering dinosaur fossils - an excavation in Hokkaido sparked a nationwide enthusiasm for dinosaurs and led to entertainment such as dinosaur robots and mechanical suits.

programme.title: The Conjuring: Last Rites
programme.desc: Experience the case that strikes at the core of Ed and Lorraine's mission and attacks the very heart of the Warren family... their daughter, Judy.

programme.title: 江湖汉子
programme.desc: 林少游、石大勇及关飞，三者俱属浪迹江湖之豪侠，表面上游戏人间，实则满怀壮志，誓以抗暴为己任。一次，机缘恰巧，林等三人助青年富户楚铁侠逃出险境，并结为生死之交。元朝异族王爷早有霸占富户财富的野心，后更借故追捕楚，林等遂出手相助，共谋抗暴大业...

programme.title: 无翼蝙蝠
programme.desc: 失踪五年的无翼蝙蝠，忽然重出江湖，奸淫少女。风流大侠萧七与总镖头雷迅追查真相，并发现无翼蝙蝠可能被嫁祸。传说无翼蝙蝠的蝙蝠刀内藏有蝙蝠宝图，于是他们将计就计，借刀引出幕后真凶...

programme.title: 千娇百媚
programme.desc: 有才华的女艺员兰兰与梅梅新加入「马氏歌舞团」，兰兰与团主马英不和。马英在报纸匿名征求女友，兰兰与他以匿名用书信往来，互生情愫。相约见面时，两人胆怯退缩。歌舞团获邀到日本表演，由马英带领，兰兰担任女主角，二人的关系可否趁机会发展？

programme.title: 红粉动江湖
programme.desc: 富家女田思思性格刁蛮任性，略通武艺。自从听闻武林名侠秦歌﻿盖世无双的英勇事迹后，心生仰慕。她拒绝顺从父亲的婚姻安排，女扮男装，私自出走寻找秦歌﻿，欲向他挑战。岂料，途中却误入黑道阴谋的漩涡......

programme.title: 牛鬼蛇神
programme.desc: 军阀割据时代，江湖人物及狡黠之徒所玩弄的传统骗术层出不穷，「蛇神」、「李三脚」、「三只手」等一群妖言惑众的骗徒令人云亦云的愚民上钓，反映旧时代一切牛鬼蛇神众生相。

programme.title: 江湖子弟
programme.desc: 本片改编自七十年代知名小说家江之南的作品。故事描述，刘永被掠去财物，为生计打劫，开罪了欧阳帮，但帮主欣赏刘胆色，交上朋友来，后保镖李丽丽对刘有好感，却惹黑旗门胡妒忌...

programme.title: 鬼马神偷
programme.desc: 鲁俊谷、张权、于洋三人乃沙煲兄弟，三人合力获得宝物「双面神」，不料却给胡起尾注，将三人毒杀，独吞「双面神」。刘永、梁家仁及梁韵蕊是他们的后人，在不打不相识之下重逢，为了完成亡父的遗志，三人齐心向胡偷回宝物。韵蕊早已混入胡家中，色诱胡之子，作为内应查出「双面神」之收藏地点。永与家仁则扮鬼扮马，偷天换日，最后偷得双面神！

programme.title: 螳螂
programme.desc: 韦风奉皇帝之命潜入田家寻找田老爷造反的证据。他因此认识了田老爷的孙女，二人更结为夫妻。韦风终于取得证据，并打算与妻子离开。田老爷得知后遂萌杀机，二人恶斗下他的妻子惨死。韦风死里逃生，并自创螳螂拳法，誓要为妻子报仇。

programme.title: 小云雀
programme.desc: 记者仕泰为发掘歌星小云雀的秘密，假扮大亨接近小云雀。后来仕泰的假大亨身份被揭穿，小云雀大怒，请来真正大亨揭穿仕泰的身份。怎料大亨很欣赏仕泰的应变能力，实时聘请他为助手，处理歌星登台事宜。

programme.title: 龙虎沟
programme.desc: 本片为导演岳枫于1966年执导之民初动作片，剧情主要描述，二妞收到父亲遇害前写下的仇人名单，遂连同兄长建明展开一幕奇情追凶...

programme.title: 82家房客
programme.desc: 延续经典喜剧《72家房客》的成功，本片讲述一羣住在香港唐楼的租客被发展商强行迫迁的故事。有些租客愿意接受金钱赔偿，但有些却坚决反对。收购计划最终又会否破坏邻里间的和谐？

programme.title: 隐身女侠
programme.desc: 年轻女剑客服下奶奶研制的隐身药后，变成白天隐形晚上现身的怪人。她无意中捣乱了黑道首领女儿的婚事，惹来连番追杀。女剑客最后如何脱险？

programme.title: 风流冤鬼
programme.desc: 红歌女阿花遭大户陶老爷奸杀，陶宅即常闹鬼，后陶老爷亦神秘死亡。陶之后人陶明嗜赌如命，更因鬼魂作怪而欠下钜款。明妻暗中将陶宅售予杨教授夫妇，即遇上怪事连篇...

programme.title: 血鹦鹉
programme.desc: 据说诸魔化成的血鹦鹉，看见它的人能得到三个愿望。江湖侠盗叶停枫为追寻血鹦鹉的真相；与名捕「铁手无情」铁恨联手。某夜，叶、铁二人在坟场遇上血鹦鹉，铁死于它的魔力之下；后叶将其尸体送回家乡安葬。其后，尸体却离奇失踪，叶经历重重险阻后，终于见到真正的血鹦鹉...

programme.title: 何日君再来
programme.desc: 富家子卓明不顾父亲反对，与歌女雪玲结婚，并因此与家庭断绝关系。婚后，雪玲怀孕，卓明因过度劳累导致视力衰退。为维持家计，雪玲重操旧业登台演唱，而卓明不愿拖累妻子，选择悄然离开。在友人鼓励下，雪玲再次公开献唱，卓明深受感动，最终与妻儿重逢。

programme.title: 万古流芳
programme.desc: 晋灵公宠信奸佞屠岸贾，时边关告急，相国赵盾启奏，反被屠岸贾挑拨，下令斩杀赵家三百余口。幸程婴抱庄姬之子赵武出走。屠下令杀全国男婴以断后患，程不惜以己子代替。赵长大，程以"雪冤图"告之，杀一家三百口仇人乃屠岸贾，更安排他与母亲相认......

programme.title: 虎胆
programme.desc: 明惠帝被篡位后，太子被藏匿在武林义士的黑龙会中，却被武林败类所袭击，迫使入世未深的剑客及侠女带着太子逃亡。他们一路上危机重重，幸得其他义士拔刀相助......

programme.title: 双侠
programme.desc: 宋朝康王被困于金营巨宅，四周被武林高手严密看守。两名身怀绝技的义士必须克服重重困难，完成看似不可能的任务，设法救出康王。

programme.title: 凤还巢
programme.desc: 兵部侍郎程浦将次女雪娥许配予好友之子穆居易，庶室程夫人既愤且恼，对居易讹称长女雪雁乃雪娥，催促二人早日成亲。居易见雪雁貌丑而痴，吓得留书出走。富豪朱焕然对雪娥心仪已久，趁此良机冒充居易，依期迎亲......本片由李香君、金峰分饰男、女主角，配搭新鲜；而蒋光超与庄元庸一胖一瘦的谐趣演出，更令人笑破肚皮。

programme.title: 书剑恩仇录
programme.desc: 乾隆原来并非皇位继承人，而在出生时被调包，但他一直被蒙在鼓里，直至地下组织红花会的人相告。而红花会总舵主陈家洛是其同胞兄弟。两弟兄因身世和利益必需身不由己地彼此对抗...

programme.title: 人蛇鼠
programme.desc: 庄家农场独子庄士德海外归来，接手由胡麟管理的产业。胡一直与德之表妹曼玲勾结，图取庄家产业，并欲利用曼玲美色迷惑德！怎知在阿芬饲养的小蛇「西西」帮助下，反令德与芬结成夫妇。后来胡买来一条专咬人的野老鼠，欲将德之初生婴儿咬死，「西西」为救婴儿，与野鼠作殊死搏斗...

programme.title: 独臂刀
programme.desc: 方刚的父亲为救神风大侠齐如峰而死，齐如峰感念救命之恩，收留方刚入金刀门。方刚却饱受师兄等人的歧视，于是决定远走他乡。齐如峰的独女与方刚决战时，竟用刀斩断其右臂，方刚却因此练成独臂刀法，最终更挺身而出救助齐如峰。

programme.title: 鳄鱼河
programme.desc: 这个故事洋溢着《罗密欧与茱丽叶》般的悲恋色彩。两个世代积怨已深的家族，被一条遍布鳄鱼的河流阻隔，谁也不愿筑桥往来。然而，命运却让两家子女在大学里邂逅并深深相爱。为了相守，他们不仅必须跨越险恶的河流，更要化解两个家族间延续多年的仇恨。

programme.title: 大内高手
programme.desc: 巡按御史傅秉忠因被控伪造公文而黯然回乡。在旅途中，他邂逅了武功高强的燕书棠，便请他全程护送。不久，他们又遇到了逃婚的少女史雪兰和她的丫鬟，二人恳求能同行，以求庇护。众人最终抵达一座破旧的庙宇准备过夜，却不料一进入庙门便遭到匪徒的埋伏袭击......

programme.title: 蝴蝶杯
programme.desc: 明朝时代，书生田玉川因替渔夫伸张正义，误杀总督之子，被迫逃亡。走投无路时，他逃至江畔，幸得渔夫之女相救。二人在险境中情愫暗生，玉川遂以传家至宝「蝴蝶杯」为信物，缔结终身之约。

programme.title: 南北少林
programme.desc: 智明在北少林习武，司马燕则在南少林习武，两人分别为报杀父之仇而合力行刺贪官，引发激战连场!

programme.title: 降头
programme.desc: 狄龙剧中为一准新郎，但却遇上心术不正的恬妮单恋痴缠，更借助邪术降头，务求夺取男方欢心。后恬妮裙下之臣罗烈及狄龙未婚妻，亦相继加入战团。一场因为爱而生与死的斗争，复杂的关系加上正邪大斗法，将人性为达一己私欲的恶行，表露无遗。至于邪是否不能胜正？且看结局便有分晓。

programme.title: Sky News Today with Sam Washington

programme.desc: Edmond the squirrel and Lucy the bear cub grew up together. They live in a majestic chestnut tree in the heart of the forest. With their friends they solve riddles and live thrilling adventures, with every day bringing new wonders to discover in the natural world around them.

programme.title: The monster
programme.desc: Dakon and Kouassi Kan attract the monster's attention by throwing stones. The monster follows the boys towards the pond before gradually disappearing into the water. Pokou has passed her second test.

programme.title: Here is a bee
programme.desc: At 6 years old the cheerful mischievous Koumi dreams of knowing all the animals in the world. Thanks to her picture book, she's able to head off and meet them.

programme.title: Belles Comptines D'afrique
programme.desc: In each episode, an animal from the African continent is highlighted in song.

programme.title: Oscar Et Malika, Toujours En Retard
programme.desc: Oscar and Malika walk to school together. Every morning, they face funny, absurd or ridiculous situations and live improbable adventures.

programme.title: The final trail
programme.desc: Lusagne's police call on a building renovation organisation. At the end of the day, two members of the team have gone missing. Alex discovers the lifeless body of one with a serious head wound. The second, recently released after a long prison sentence, is nowhere to be found.

programme.title: Mauvaise Graine
programme.desc: Deprived of his favourite car by his father, a young idler joins a gang of car thieves. There he falls in love with the muse of the gang, but above all he must be wary of the kingpin who runs it. The first steps of a filmmaker destined to become one of Hollywood's greatest.

programme.title: The Astronaut
programme.desc: After returning from her first space mission, astronaut Sam Walker fears that something extraterrestrial has followed her back to Earth.

programme.title: The Stepford Wives
programme.desc: In the town of Stepford, Nicole Kidman and Matthew Broderick find that all the women are perfect - a little too perfect.

programme.title: Monster Trucks
programme.desc: When a high school senior discovers a gas-guzzling creature, he embarks on a journey to reunite his new-found friend with his family.

programme.title: Us
programme.desc: An endearing American family is pitted against a terrifying and uncanny opponent: doppelgängers of themselves.

programme.title: A Star Is Born
programme.desc: In this new take on the tragic love story, a seasoned musician discovers and falls in love with a struggling artiste.

programme.title: Caddo Lake
programme.desc: The disappearance of an eight-year-old girl sets off a chain of events.

programme.title: No Reservations
programme.desc: Catherine Zeta Jones stars as a chef with a fiery temper struggling to care for her orphan niece and manage the handsome new sous chef.

programme.title: The Stepford Wives
programme.desc: In the town of Stepford, Nicole Kidman and Matthew Broderick find that all the women are perfect - a little too perfect.

programme.title: How To Train Your Dragon: The Hidden World
programme.desc: Faced with an impending threat unlike others, Hiccup and Toothless battle to protect all that they love with a female Light Fury as they travel to a mythical hidden world.

programme.title: Us
programme.desc: An endearing American family is pitted against a terrifying and uncanny opponent: doppelgängers of themselves.

programme.title: Monster Trucks
programme.desc: When a high school senior discovers a gas-guzzling creature, he embarks on a journey to reunite his new-found friend with his family.

programme.title: Smile 2
programme.desc: Global pop sensation Skye Riley begins experiencing increasingly terrifying and inexplicable events.

programme.title: The Case of the Pirate's Treasure
programme.desc: Queen Sparklewings asks the Pirate Captain to do the first dance with her at the Queen's Dance. But when it's time to practise, the Captain can't come: someone's stolen their treasure! Noddy decides to help find the treasure so the Captain will still be able to dance. He needs to investigate: Who stole the Pirates' treasure?

programme.title: The Case Of The Empty Store
programme.desc: Clockwork Mouse leaves Carlton in charge of getting everything ready for the Builders' Parade. Carlton gratefully accepts Noddy's offer of help but doesn't want the Naughticorns helping too! But when Carlton goes to the Brickabuild Store for supplies, he's horrified to discover the store is empty. How will they get the parade ready now? And will Clockwork Mouse ever trust Carlton again? Noddy sets out to investigate: Who took all the stuff from the Brickabuild Store?

programme.title: Why Porcupine Has Quills
programme.desc: You see there was a time when Porcupine didn't have quills, she had the softest coat in all of Tinga Tinga… and Jackal wanted it. Despite warnings from all the animals Porcupine allows Jackal to invite her to his cave to keep out of the rain. Porcupine takes off her coat to allow it to dry, but while she sleeps naughty Jackal runs off with it. When she awakes Porcupine is covered in lots of tiny ant bites and they itch and they itch and they itch.

programme.title: Why Lizard Always Hides Under Rocks
programme.desc: You see there was a time when Lizard didn't hide under rocks. He would scamper around Tinga Tinga pinching other animals food and keeping it all for himself. Then one day the animals decide to give greedy Lizard a dose of his own medicine. When Lizard realizes the error of his ways he runs and hides under a rock too ashamed to show his face in Tinga Tinga. Tales from Africa.

programme.title: Postman Pat And The Winter Games
programme.desc: The children are excited as there's a big Winter Snowdown on the fells.

programme.title: Postman Pat And The Bucking Bronco
programme.desc: Hopes are high for this evening's hoe-down on Greendale's village green - especially among PC Selby and Ted, who each harbour hopes of dancing with Dr Gilbertson. Pat's mission is to deliver one of Ted's inventions, a mechanical horse or "bucking bronco", to the event. But when the bronco is accidentally switched on in the back of Pat's van, it rolls away and Pat can't find a way to recapture it. He enlists Amy's help, but jealous Pumpkin pushes the bronco away, making matters worse.

programme.title: Homesick Tin Top
programme.desc: Tin Top just can't master corners no matter how hard he tries. The other cars try to help him to no avail… until Roary hits on a brilliant plan.

programme.title: Save Our Tree
programme.desc: Mr Carburettor is planning on cutting down Flash's tree. What can be done to save the poor rabbit's home?

programme.title: New Juice
programme.desc: Conrod is visiting Silver Hatch to try out some new bio fuel. But Big Chris fears something is wrong with it after he comes out in spots after sampling a smoothie made from the same produce. What or who could be at fault?

programme.title: Fb For Football
programme.desc: The cars are having a football tournament down at the beach. FB learns that if he relaxes, his natural footballing skills will shine through.

programme.title: The Case Of The Diabolo
programme.desc: Noddy's delighted to be given a diabolo by Big Ears. But when Noddy tries it out for the first time, the diabolo crashes and breaks in two. Even worse, when Noddy goes to retrieve the two halves, he finds that they're both missing! Noddy needs to investigate. Where is his new toy?

programme.title: The Case Of The Vanished Trophy
programme.desc: Queen Sparklewings invites the toys to play a game of Catch the Flag at the castle. But when the special trophy goes missing, Noddy has to investigate. Where is the vanished trophy?

programme.title: The Case Of The Lost Cows
programme.desc: When Train hears cows near the railway tracks, he's worried that he might scare them and he insists on going really slow. Trouble is there's a load of Builders on board who need to get to Brickabuild fast. Noddy decides to investigate. Where are the lost cows?

programme.title: The Case Of The Burst Tyres
programme.desc: There's a race at the loop-the-loop. Deltoid brings the prize for the winner: a beautiful model of the loop the loop circuit made by Pat Pat and Smartysaurus. All the toys are very excited, but before the race starts the tyres of Deltoid's tribike are burst! Could it be one of the contestants trying to prevent him from winning the race? Noddy needs to find out so that the race can take place.

programme.title: Dollhouse Safari
programme.desc: It's time for a safari adventure in the dollhouse! Carlita, decked out like a safari truck, takes Gabby and Pandy on an adventure through the dollhouse as they follow clues to find the mysterious Felis Catus and discover all kinds of other dollhouse wildlife along the way! For the COTD segment, Cakey and Parrot show us how to make adorable safari snacks.

programme.title: Abra-CAT-Dabra
programme.desc: Baby Box is learning to be a great magician and wants to pull a rabbit out of a hat. But when there's no rabbit to be found, Gabby, Pandy and Baby Box visit the other Gabby Cats for help. For the COTD, Baby Box, Gabby and Pandy sing the "Whoopsies!" Song.

programme.title: Belly Flop
programme.desc: The Riders have to save Elbone when he's swallowed by a giant Sea Gronckle, and Dak's awful cooking might be just the thing to do it.

programme.title: Game of Horns
programme.desc: At a big town festival, Magnus challenges Duggard in a competition to be chief of Huttsgalor! Can the Riders help their friend keep his helmet?

programme.title: Gopher it! / A Glamping We Will Go
programme.desc: When a pesky gopher gets in the way of Fawna making her famous veggie stew, Niah learns to not let a bad experience, get in the way of doing good. / When the inexperienced Rona has to step in for Donna, the team makes sure everyone has the best camping trip ever.

programme.title: Level Up / Reed and the Beanstalk
programme.desc: The Dews think a double rainbow is making their powers change, but what they discover is that they are about to graduate to a new level of Dew Dropness, with the newfound ability to float in the air! / When Reed discovers he’s being assigned a family, he runs to tell Athena, only to find Athena and her house are missing! While Eden and Phoebe search for Athena, Reed’s on Dew Drop duty for Athena. After successfully helping Athena's kids, Reed is assigned the family in the apartment below Athena.

programme.title: The Case Of The Diabolo
programme.desc: Noddy's delighted to be given a diabolo by Big Ears. But when Noddy tries it out for the first time, the diabolo crashes and breaks in two. Even worse, when Noddy goes to retrieve the two halves, he finds that they're both missing! Noddy needs to investigate. Where is his new toy?

programme.title: The Case Of The Vanished Trophy
programme.desc: Queen Sparklewings invites the toys to play a game of Catch the Flag at the castle. But when the special trophy goes missing, Noddy has to investigate. Where is the vanished trophy?

programme.title: The Case Of The Lost Cows
programme.desc: When Train hears cows near the railway tracks, he's worried that he might scare them and he insists on going really slow. Trouble is there's a load of Builders on board who need to get to Brickabuild fast. Noddy decides to investigate. Where are the lost cows?

programme.title: The Case Of The Burst Tyres
programme.desc: There's a race at the loop-the-loop. Deltoid brings the prize for the winner: a beautiful model of the loop the loop circuit made by Pat Pat and Smartysaurus. All the toys are very excited, but before the race starts the tyres of Deltoid's tribike are burst! Could it be one of the contestants trying to prevent him from winning the race? Noddy needs to find out so that the race can take place.

programme.title: Dollhouse Detectives
programme.desc: There's a mystery in the dollhouse! When things start to mysteriously disappear around the dollhouse, Gabby and Pandy play detectives, using all their senses to find clues, follow them, and solve the mystery. For our COTD segment, CatRat and Baby Me-Owls show us how to make ice cube paints!

programme.title: Mission to CATurn
programme.desc: When CatRat gets stuck on planet Caturn, it's up to Gabby and Pandy to go save him. DJ Catnip teaches them a song to remember how to get there and Baby Box helps them make jetpacks so they can zip around. In the Cat-osphere, they take a twirl through Space Swirls and zip through the Supergallactic Doughnut Hole and even meet DJ Catnip's cousin, DJ Comet! For the Cat of the Day Segment, Baby Box and DJ Comet show us how to craft a papier-mâché Caturn.

programme.title: Sea Monsters / Puff Fruit
programme.desc: Rumors of scary sea monsters in the East End take the kids on a journey of discovering you shouldn’t believe everything you hear. / Mysterious globs disturbing the ocean turn out to be the byproduct of food from Unicorn Land.

programme.title: Chef J's Tale
programme.desc: Chef J tells a tale about unicorns sailing in ships on clouds in search of Unicorn Land.

programme.title: The Pawston Chewbilee / Don’t Go, Cat. Go!
programme.desc: Based on PD Eastman's classic children’s book, Go, Dog. Go! Follows 6-year-old dog, Tag Barker, on her hilarious adventures in the city of Pawston, a fun-loving community of dogs on the go. Tag is a skilled mechanic and loves anything that goes. With her ingenuity and creativity, Tag can go as far as any plan will take her, always with her best friend, Scooch Pooch, by her side. Scooch’s easy-going nature is the perfect counterbalance to Tag’s high-octane energy.

programme.title: Snow Dog, Snow!
programme.desc: When Tag and Scooch learn that Sandra Paws' sleigh broke down on a mountain, they have to go on an adventure to fix the sleigh and save Sniffs-mas! Meanwhile, Beans tries to get a grumpy Frank to feel the Sniffs-mas spirit.

programme.title: Night
programme.desc: The crew uses Lightning Bitbugs to light up the garage when Dozer needs a late-night repair, but need a new plan after Scrapadactyls attack.

programme.title: Lucky and the Big Goodbye
programme.desc: While Lucky attempts to win over a town that is unwelcoming to the circus, she starts to question her own reasoning to stay

programme.title: Thunk O'clock High / The Croo-Gitive
programme.desc: Thunk must face a bully that's notorious for being an animal/The Croods flee after Grug is accused of robbing caves and stealing food for the Broods

programme.title: A Few Good Grugs / Valley Shine Day
programme.desc: The Valley has the first "try-all" against the Croods to see if Grug stole food for the Broods; Thunk asks Kevin to teach him to be more irresistible

programme.title: Total Nightmare
programme.desc: When Hookfang is drawn to a female Monstrous Nightmare, Snotlout tries to break them up before he loses his friend forever.

programme.title: Team Astrid
programme.desc: After Dagur attacks Berk, Astrid trauns a crew of back-up Dragon riders to battle back, although no one anticipates how soon the strike will come.

programme.title: Hide The Lightning
programme.desc: Po and team go to the city of Tikal to get more information on the Protector, but it's easier said than done, since nobody in the town actually knows the identity of the Protector. Blade becomes increasingly frustrated and Po attempts to help her.

programme.title: The Beast
programme.desc: Po and team play a game of Pok-ta-pok against a family of armadillos for the opportunity to talk one on one with Zuma, the leader. The game brings out a highly competitive and aggressive side to Blade, known as "The Beast." Back in China, Colin and Weimin find the Pirate Queen and become part of her pirate crew.

programme.title: Fluffy Flufferton
programme.desc: Feline popstar sensation Fluffy Flufferton is performing a concert at the Dollhouse Hotel, and Gabby unboxes tickets to see her! Gabby meets Fluffy and discovers that she’s afraid to try new things because she doesn’t want to make mistakes-why mess with perfection? But with the help of the Gabby Cats, Fluffy learns how to fail fantastically and be the most fluff-tastic version of herself. For our Cat of the Day segment, DJ Catnip sings a song about the Dollhouse Hotel.

programme.title: Cakey’s Cupcake Cousins
programme.desc: When Gabby unboxes a tin full of Cakey-like cupcake kitties, she realizes... Cakey's Cousins are coming to visit! Cakey welcomes his Cousins to the dollhouse and leads them through a fun-filled itinerary of activities, but quickly realizes his cousins have an agenda of their own. For our Gabby Cat of the Day segment, Pillow Cat sings a song!

programme.title: Gabby, I Shrunk the Kitties!
programme.desc: Gabby and Pandy accidentally get turned teeny-tiny when one of Mercat's potions spills. To get back to their normal size, they need to find the right ingredients to make a grow potion, which means going on an itty-bitty search through the dollhouse! For our Cat of the Day segment, Mercat shows us how to make sparkly, mermaid slime.

programme.title: Ga Ba Goo Ba Ga (The Babblist)
programme.desc: There’s a new "babblist" in town- someone who claims to understand baby talk. Boss Baby spots this fraud right away;and must debunk his tactics before he scams the playgroup parents. Meanwhile;Tim tries to sell magazines with Boss Baby’s help.

programme.title: The Coo Chi Coup
programme.desc: Boss Baby loves awards- and the Golden Rattle trophy is no exception. When presented with the chance to win an award at a company retreat;he must choose between his pride and his team.

programme.title: Lights, Camera, Org Chart!
programme.desc: Boss Baby creates an org chart to cement his leadership as the Boss of the playgroup babies. However when Bubbeezee photographer Travis Le Duque chooses anyone but Boss for his coverspread;the status quo is upended! Tim continues to fail his class assignment: a model solar system

programme.title: Captain Underpants and the Monstrous Mayhem of the Massive Melviathan
programme.desc: A run-of-the-mill arts and crafts session turns into an interdimensional adventure from which Harold, George and company may never return.

programme.title: Captain Underpants and the Savage Spite of the Slimy Salamangler
programme.desc: Krupp's campers take on rich rivals in a hoity-toity boat race that also features a revenge-obsessed giant salamander. Paging Captain Underpants!

programme.title: Captain Underpants and the Cunning Combat of the Covert Camoflush
programme.desc: The campers' splat-tastic game of paintball is rather rudely interrupted by a foul and formidable fiend known only as Camoflush.

programme.title: Sirocco Fire Explosion
programme.desc: Cleve has the team surrounded - is this the end? Suddenly, Cisco bursts in to save the day, along with all of the friends the team has made along the way in the Sahara. Working together, they manage to stop Cleve’s missiles and defeat Rafaela and Matsuo. But before they get a chance to celebrate, a giant fire tornado tears its way through the Sahara destroying everything in its path. Tony decides to make one last daring attempt in order to save the day.

programme.title: Chasing Phantoms
programme.desc: After an epic chase around the globe, the team finally catches Rafaela, making it Ms. Nowhere's 100th arrest - and the agency is throwing her a party! Meanwhile, Cisco's uncle Tuco, a famous luchador in Mexico, is visiting town promoting his next show. But the celebration comes to a halt when there's an explosion at the party and an attack by a mysterious group of criminals!

programme.title: The Convoy
programme.desc: When the team is framed for the events of Ms. Nowhere's party, they're arrested and are on their way to separate government facilities. It's up to Frostee, with a help from Sissy, to track down the team and bust them out before they're locked up for good!

programme.title: A Grim Retreat
programme.desc: The Riders head to a tropical island for fun in the sun, not realizing it's infested with Grimora Leeches which drives their dragons to turn on them.

programme.title: To Heather Or Not To Heather
programme.desc: When Heather and Windshear land on Dragon's Edge to join the Dragon Rider crew, they quickly discover that Windshear doesn't play well with others.

programme.title: Stryke Out
programme.desc: Hiccup and Toothless are captured and must find a way to escape the Dragon Fighting arena and survive an attack from the fearsome Triple Stryke dragon.

programme.title: Hiss Hiss Bang Bang
programme.desc: Eager to return to normal life, Jim struggles with re-adjusting as he leads the Trollhunting team to track down three Goblins that escaped the Darklands

programme.title: Hero With A Thousand Faces
programme.desc: Jim tries to impress Claire's parents when invited over for BBQ, but when his Amulet goes haywire, Jim must contend with his own worst enemy - himself

programme.title: Just Add Water
programme.desc: The students are assigned to care for flour babies in Health Class but must worry more than just their grades after discovering a Gruesome lurking in Arcadia

programme.title: Doom and Groom
programme.desc: Po and the team have one last attempt to get the pendant, but they will have to disrupt Jayesh's wedding, and contend with his guards, to do so. At the mage island, Klaus and Veruca get hold of the Tianshang helmet.

programme.title: The Pinging

programme.title: I Promise It Was Him
programme.desc: A woman calls 911 with a story of being abducted and forced into the trunk of her car by a masked assailant who fatally shoots her girlfriend.

programme.title: A Tell Tale Heart
programme.desc: When the body of a Jane Doe is found dumped on a roadside, it's up to Dr. Satish Chundru to identify her and find out how she died, spawning an investigation retracing the victim's last night.

programme.title: Reckless Driver Or Tragic Accident?
programme.desc: A woman faces life in prison when a passenger in the car she is driving is killed after she collides with an 18-wheel truck. Was she an intoxicated driver, or was it a tragic accident?

programme.title: Beneath The Surface
programme.desc: A vibrant, social media savvy, 15-year-old girl goes missing in a small town, leaving the community perplexed to what happened.

programme.title: It's Not Over
programme.desc: An altercation in a casino parking lot leads to murder when friends abandon reason for revenge.

programme.title: A Deadly Drink For Dad
programme.desc: When an 85-year-old man passes away after years of failing health, authorities quickly rule it a natural death and close the case.

programme.title: Murdered Amongst Friends
programme.desc: A local news story reignites a decades-old cold case, leading investigators to question a close-knit circle of friends who they believe are hiding the truth about the disappearance of a 25-year-old man.
A family tries to exorcise their home from disturbances. Next, popular Malaysian teen idol Aedy Ashraf shares his encounter with the unseen at a hotel room.
A TV crew filming at the site of a high-profile murder encounters something strange. Next, a famous TV host gets spooked while filming at a haunted bridge.

programme.title: Takeout Drugs
programme.desc: A man leads police on a high-speed chase in a stolen mail truck. A restaurant owner is arrested after hiding drugs in a takeout box. A pizza delivery guy helps the cops arrest a thief; and more.

programme.title: The Great Beach Escape
programme.desc: A look at some of the strangest arrests from across the country: a man drives through a store hours after having trashed it; a Florida neighbourhood falls victim to shocking deliveries; and more!

programme.title: Kay Baker
programme.desc: When a beloved Florida teacher is found beaten to death on a neighbour’s lawn, a blood trail leads detectives to her partner-and exposes a violent history fuelled by jealousy.

programme.title: Edward Ates
programme.desc: Edward Ates takes a polygraph test with former FBI agent George Olivo in a bid to show his innocence. He spent 20 years behind bars for the murder of his neighbour-a crime he says he didn’t commit.

programme.title: Out Of Reach
programme.desc: What begins as an open-and-shut case spins into a full-on investigation when a mother and son are found dead in their home. Was this a murder/suicide, or could someone else have been responsible?

programme.title: Lia (Part A)
programme.desc: When Lia was ten, she became intrigued by her mother's many collectibles and started going to antique stores and estate sales with her and is where Lia suspects her hoarding compulsion originates.

programme.title: Out Of Reach
programme.desc: What begins as an open-and-shut case spins into a full-on investigation when a mother and son are found dead in their home. Was this a murder/suicide, or could someone else have been responsible?

programme.title: A Deadly Drink For Dad
programme.desc: When an 85-year-old man passes away after years of failing health, authorities quickly rule it a natural death and close the case.

programme.title: Takeout Drugs
programme.desc: A man leads police on a high-speed chase in a stolen mail truck. A restaurant owner is arrested after hiding drugs in a takeout box. A pizza delivery guy helps the cops arrest a thief; and more.

programme.title: A Deadly Drink For Dad
programme.desc: When an 85-year-old man passes away after years of failing health, authorities quickly rule it a natural death and close the case.

programme.title: Out Of Reach
programme.desc: What begins as an open-and-shut case spins into a full-on investigation when a mother and son are found dead in their home. Was this a murder/suicide, or could someone else have been responsible?

programme.title: Takeout Drugs
programme.desc: A man leads police on a high-speed chase in a stolen mail truck. A restaurant owner is arrested after hiding drugs in a takeout box. A pizza delivery guy helps the cops arrest a thief; and more.

programme.title: Should Have Gotten Arrested In The 90s
programme.desc: A man in Virginia Beach parties a little too hard at a parade and suffers a medical emergency when he ends up in jail. Meanwhile, a stand-up comedian learns the hard way that not everyone can take a joke.

programme.title: The Invitation
programme.desc: In Tulsa, a party becomes the scene of a murder. For investigators and prosecutors, the case is riding on two accomplices betraying their friends, despite the risks.

programme.title: 唐人街探案2
programme.desc: 唐仁（王宝强饰）为巨额奖金欺骗秦风（刘昊然饰）到纽约参加世界名侦探大赛，比赛的内容是寻找杀害纽约唐人街教父七叔的孙子的凶手。两人再次组合侦破案件，并冒着生命危险闹翻纽约。

programme.title: 天才冲冲冲
programme.desc: 「寓教于乐」的大型综艺节目, 节目单元不仅推陈出新, 在生活中更能与三五好友, 一同尝试节目中的各项游戏, 亲身体验节目中的各项乐趣。

programme.title: 以爱为营
programme.desc: 财经记者郑书意（白鹿饰）为拿下头版几经努力争取和有名的年轻霸道总裁时宴（王鶴棣饰）进行采访，两人互相留下了深刻印象。最终阴差阳错的爱情慢慢升温。

programme.title: 非诚勿扰 12
programme.desc: 非诚勿扰是一档适应现代生活节奏的大型婚恋交友节目, 在广大单身男女提供了一个公开的婚恋交友平台的同时, 也迎来了新的当红男星作为新一任的非诚合伙人。

programme.title: 市井豪门
programme.desc: 一条街隔开两个世界。一边是努力生活有苦也有笑的市场人生，一边是勾心斗角有钱却战战兢兢的豪门日子。

programme.title: 声生不息·华流季
programme.desc: 以"华流国际化"为核心，《声生不息·华流季》以音乐对抗与融合为引，推动华语音乐走向世界。从金曲回忆到文化共鸣，跨越三代的声音在舞台上汇聚，用旋律唤醒集体记忆，谱写属于华语乐坛的自信新章。

programme.title: 长相思第一季
programme.desc: 流落大荒的皓翎王姬小夭 历经百年颠沛之苦，在清水镇成为悬壶为生的玟小六，机缘之下与玱玹, 涂山璟, 相柳, 阿念, 赤水丰隆等人上演了一场亲情, 爱情, 友情的纠葛故事。

programme.title: 把关者们
programme.desc: 故事围绕版权及商标调查科高级监督海锋（袁伟豪饰）、总贸易管制主任关佩欣（黄智雯饰）、海关毒品调查课监督温芷祺（王敏奕饰）与一众海关菁英追究原子弹、白粉等海关风波。

programme.title: 非诚勿扰 12
programme.desc: 非诚勿扰是一档适应现代生活节奏的大型婚恋交友节目, 在广大单身男女提供了一个公开的婚恋交友平台的同时, 也迎来了新的当红男星作为新一任的非诚合伙人。

programme.title: 我想和你唱5
programme.desc: 《我想和你唱》第五季震撼回归！本季节目将继续升维星素共唱新玩法，通过搭档形式，让广大民众展现才华，演绎出多元的音乐风格。让我们一同感受大众力量的扩音，沉浸式体验音乐最本真的愉悦，让记忆中的美妙旋律闪耀发光吧!

programme.title: 把关者们
programme.desc: 故事围绕版权及商标调查科高级监督海锋（袁伟豪饰）、总贸易管制主任关佩欣（黄智雯饰）、海关毒品调查课监督温芷祺（王敏奕饰）与一众海关菁英追究原子弹、白粉等海关风波。
