programme.title: The World (2026)
programme.desc: There's never been a more important time to stay in touch with what's happening in our world. Girish Sawlani presents the latest international news from ABC News correspondents as well as interviews with experts and guests.

programme.title: News Breakfast (2026)
programme.desc: James Glenday and Emma Rebellato bring you the latest news, overnight developments, interviews and new details on the top stories this morning, joined by Catherine Murphy with sport and Lillian Rangiah with weather.

programme.title: News Breakfast (2026)
programme.desc: As each day begins get the facts you need to stay informed. James Glenday and Emma Rebellato present the latest news, overnight developments and today's top stories, joined by Catherine Murphy, Nate Byrne and Lillian Rangiah.

programme.title: ABC News Mornings (2026)
programme.desc: Stay in the know with what's going on this morning. ABC News brings you up-to-the-minute news to fuel your daily conversations so you can stay connected and follow the discussion across the day. Presented by Kathryn Robinson.

programme.title: ABC News At Noon (2026)
programme.desc: The leading news at lunchtime. Ros Childs brings you the day's top stories and the latest news as it unfolds, with reporters in the community across Australia and around the world reporting on the issues that matter to you.

programme.title: Autumn: Coastal Succulents & Rustic Natives
programme.desc: Clarence creates a rustic native display, Guest Presenter Thanh bites into delectable dragon fruit, Josh meets a team of smart sniffer dogs that can detect plant disease, and Tammy finds clever plantings on a coastal terrace.

programme.title: Island Echoes with Nornie Bero S1
programme.desc: Join acclaimed Torres Strait Islander chef and cultural ambassador Nornie Bero in Island Echoes, a vibrant journey through the breathtaking landscapes and rich traditions of her homeland.

programme.title: On Country Kitchen S2
programme.desc: It's season 2 and Derek still can't cook! With locally found ingredients, and a sprinkle of culture and character, Mark and Derek create an Indigenous-inspired feast for the people they visit along their journey.

programme.title: The Pacific (2026)
programme.desc: The Pacific region is rich with culture, people and stories. Johnson Raela and Alice Lolohea bring you the stories that matter to the Pacific and the most up-to-date information, from journalists with deep regional expertise.

programme.title: That Pacific Sports Show (2026)
programme.desc: Join Tiana Penitani Gray and Sam Wykes for your weekly hit of Pacific joy, as they share inspiring stories and incredible sporting prowess of athletes with Pacific Island heritage, from Australia and around the world.

programme.title: ABC News with Joe O'Brien (2026)
programme.desc: Joe O'Brien brings you a comprehensive summary of the day's events, with the latest breaking news, in depth coverage of the top stories, live crosses, interviews and explainers to bring you up to speed on what's going on.

programme.title: Autumn: Coastal Succulents & Rustic Natives
programme.desc: Clarence creates a rustic native display, Guest Presenter Thanh bites into delectable dragon fruit, Josh meets a team of smart sniffer dogs that can detect plant disease, and Tammy finds clever plantings on a coastal terrace.

programme.title: ABC National News (2026)
programme.desc: There's never been a more important time for transparency and trust. ABC News brings you the day's top stories and latest news, with more reporters to tell you what's going on and why it matters. Presented by Joe O'Brien.

programme.title: Round 8 - Adelaide Crows v Port Adelaide
programme.desc: ABC Australia brings you Australian Rules football live in your lounge room every week with coverage of the 2026 AFL Premiership Season.

programme.title: Lost (Part 2) Celine Cremer
programme.desc: Two and half years after Belgian backpacker Celine Cremer went missing on a short hike, friends and local volunteers scour the forest and finally find the answers they're looking for. (Part 2)

programme.title: Asia News Week (2026)
programme.desc: Yvonne Yong brings you a weekly roundup of the stories making news across the Asia region, plus what's trending on social media and making an impact on the culture and the way people live.

programme.title: The World (2026)
programme.desc: There's never been a more important time to stay in touch with what's happening in our world. Manny Tsigas presents the latest international news from ABC News correspondents as well as interviews with experts and guests.

programme.title: Autumn: Coastal Succulents & Rustic Natives
programme.desc: Clarence creates a rustic native display, Guest Presenter Thanh bites into delectable dragon fruit, Josh meets a team of smart sniffer dogs that can detect plant disease, and Tammy finds clever plantings on a coastal terrace.

programme.title: 油鬼子
programme.desc: 故事描述沈元（李修贤）亡父与林亚峇（谷峰）为生死之交。沈父临终前，曾在林之背上刺有神秘图案，而此图实是一道有特殊功能的符。后林为保护女儿中月（陈萍）而杀人，被判死刑；林被处死前，着沈把图案描下，以备不时之须。沈按图文指示，化身成威力无穷的油鬼子，帮助过不少人，亦铲除不少坏人，但最终却陷入疯狂状态。

programme.title: 荒岛尸变
programme.desc: 一向酷爱钻研丧尸的Jeff，为追求刺激与朋友们勇闯一个荒废多年的神秘小岛。初时众人以为是个普通探险之旅，但冒险之旅却顿变为惊栗的旅程。直到他们被困荒岛，遇到丧尸的袭击，毫无还击之力之余，面对死亡的边缘，游戏才正式揭开序幕。

programme.title: 关云长
programme.desc: 这是一场发生在三国动荡时期的史诗式之旅。曹操试图招揽关羽加入他的阵营，但关羽忠于他的结拜兄弟刘备，也是曹操的敌人。当关羽试图从曹操手上救出刘备的小妾时，迫于无奈要大开杀戒。最后他能否杀出重围？

programme.title: 煞面迷影
programme.desc: 当年轻母亲为女儿莫名失踪而苦恼时，一连串怪异的事件接踵而至。这都可能与二十年前的意外亡魂为复仇归来有关...

programme.title: 鹿鼎记
programme.desc: 韦小宝被反清复明的"天地会"被派到皇宫当卧底，受命查探四十二章经下落。韦小宝很快成为康熙皇帝的心腹，但他既要执行天地会的任务，最后陷入两难的状态。

programme.title: 除暴安良
programme.desc: 三名持枪劫匪抢劫了一批正在运送的新发行货币，刑警常勇奉命展开调查。随着线索逐渐浮现，常勇成功击毙一名劫匪。然而，其他两名劫匪不甘就此罢手，乘乱密谋抢劫金厂的黄金。常勇凭藉精密的部署，成功粉碎了他们的计划，将不法分子绳之以法。

programme.title: 龙虎武师
programme.desc: 香港动作电影向来以龙虎武师的真功夫蜚声国际。这部纪录片向过去所有的龙虎武师致敬，并用上超过两年时间梳理了海量的影像资料，更采访了无数动作特技演员分享拍摄时的辛酸事迹，当中包括著名武打巨星成龙、甄子丹及洪金宝。

programme.title: 降龙大师：魔龙咒
programme.desc: 龙王被降龙大师封印了五百年，龙王之女为解除父亲的封印，不惜穿越时空，回到五百年前杀掉降龙大师。但她没想到五百年前的龙王与降龙大师竟是生死挚友...

programme.title: 逃学威龙
programme.desc: 飞虎队精英周星星奉命潜入校园，调查一宗警枪失窃案。在拍档达叔的协助下，他不仅成功寻回失枪，更意外揭发一宗大型地下军火交易。走私集团为报复，悍然持械闯入学校，挟持多名学生作为人质。周星星必须不惜一切代价，拯救所有人质。

programme.title: 烈探
programme.desc: 警探张荼为救落入人贩之手的儿子，不惜孤身深入敌穴，跨国追击，但却被牵扯进大型儿童拐卖案。在寻找儿子的过程中，他和身份神秘的女子携手捣毁了一个大型国际犯罪集团，上演了一场惊心动魄的绝地生死营救。

programme.title: 破坏之王
programme.desc: 外卖员何金银为让他的女神阿丽对他刮目相看，发奋习武，并学了奇怪的招式。胆小怕事的他一次头戴加菲猫面具拯救了阿丽，不料事后被空手道大师段水流领功。银为揭穿真相，最终在擂台使出绝招"无敌风火轮"击败段大师，并抱得美人归。

programme.title: 龙门飞甲
programme.desc: 本片重拍自1966年经典武侠片《龙门客栈》，当时东厂与西厂宦官掌控朝政，腐败横行。侠客赵怀安与一群刺客联手，秘密铲除宦官势力，维护忠良与国家安定。

programme.title: 十万火急
programme.desc: 这是关于香港消防员的英勇救火故事。勇敢的消防员无惧冲天大火，肩负救灾扶危的重任，甚至舍身救人。但当消防员脱下制服后，是否仍同样勇敢地面对自身的难题呢？

programme.title: 贼王之王
programme.desc: 两名私家侦探欲藉破一连环大劫案而声名大噪。岂料调查过程中竟一再被贼王使计愚弄，笑话连篇。及后更发现原来所有劫案均与日商宫本有关，到底谁才是真正的贼王之王？

programme.title: 错爱迷踪
programme.desc: 跟朋友在酒吧喝酒的女孩邂逅恐怖小说家，两人一见钟情感情迅速升温。原来女孩已悄然落入惊天迷局，全因小说家的前女友是个毁容的女鬼，她借用人面还魂复仇，与前男友联手开启夺命惊吓。

programme.title: 虚拟特攻
programme.desc: 金牌保镖龙威在妻子惨死后患上了创伤后应激障碍，心情低落。他意外结识高科技公司职员Amy，在她邀请下参加了新产品的虚拟测试。龙威测试成功后即成为该公司的虚拟特攻，更获试用新发明的防护机甲，不料遭遇神秘武装人员入侵，一场生死大战即将展开...

programme.title: 龙的传人
programme.desc: 青年周小龙离开纯朴的离岛到香港发展。他的师叔欺骗小龙参加桌球比赛，并以他父亲的地皮作为赌注。小龙最后输掉了比赛，幸得他青梅竹马的朋友毛毛鼓励，把自家的田地也作为赌注。小龙最后能否把自己的土地赢回来？

programme.title: 封口者
programme.desc: 罗雪与男友吵架后，出走来到深山民宿与伊伊成为合租室友。一晚，罗雪无意中撞破依依及其友人雷松杀死依依的前男友。为免走漏消息，他们囚禁罗雪于阁楼中。罗雪的知己苏文发现她失踪后，到处找寻她的下落。最后，罗雪及苏文能否成功逃出险境?

programme.title: 天官赐福
programme.desc: 康熙少年嗣位，太后急欲替他完婚，遂选纳大臣之女纳兰琼瑶为妃，但琼瑶为争取婚姻自由离家出走，康熙亦乐得不用成婚。后来康熙微服下江南，却偶遇女扮男装的琼瑶...

programme.title: 盲战
programme.desc: 前特警队长东谷在任务中罹患永久性失明，之后更被胁迫要承担任务失败的责任。幸好东谷在女儿的陪伴下逐渐走出阴霾，并开始适应黑暗的世界。可是曾经的宿敌再度出现，令女儿陷入危险之中。东谷为救女儿，展开了一场生死盲战。

programme.title: 风云雄霸天下
programme.desc: 武林霸主雄霸为称霸天下，听信泥菩萨的预言，寻得风、云两名孩童。他杀其父母后，将二人收为义子，授其绝学。待风云二人武功大成，实力已足以与师父比肩。然而，雄霸之女同时倾心于风云二人，致使风云之间暗生妒火。最终，当雄霸将女儿许配给聂风时，这场宿命之战终于被引爆。

programme.title: 我爱罗兰度
programme.desc: Lolanto自命风流，一次因伤入院结识了富商的弱智独生女儿阿蚊，她如小孩般天真可爱，渐渐更与Lolanto成为好友。蚊父因此聘请Lolanto来照顾她。不久，蚊入院做智力恢复手术，但恢复智力后的阿蚊与Lolanto建立的情谊却黯然离去...

programme.title: 多乐路
programme.desc: 东北某小城，一家麻辣汤馆每天都迎来不同的客人。这些客人中有如胶似漆的小情侣，两名放荡不羁的青年和一位的士司机。他们本是毫无交集的人，却因为一场交通事故牵扯在一起...

programme.title: 裂战
programme.desc: 为了对抗温室效应，女科学家颜欣培育出超级橡胶种子，前往一个荒岛进行种植，希望将那里改变为一片欣欣向荣的新土地。然而，她的前夫决定在这趟危险的旅程中保护她，与她结伴同行。抵达后，他们面临接连不断的冲突，并遇上当地的贩毒组织，一场生死对决随即展开。

programme.title: 缘份
programme.desc: 一个刚毕业的年青人在地铁站内邂逅一个美丽动人的女子，并对她一见钟情。在另一方面，他正被一个富家女展开追求。而此时他倾心的那女子，也正周旋于一个已婚男子之中。当那年青人向她表白时，那女子要求与他在地铁站内玩捉迷藏来决定大家的缘份！

programme.title: 情圣
programme.desc: 终日偷呃拐骗的程胜被贵利王所迫，要与女骗子叶圆合谋洗劫一间豪华大宅。不料却遇上另一群骗子冒充豪宅屋主去偷取屋内的古董，程胜和叶圆唯有扮成到访的阔少和太太。当他们发现对方的真正身份后，决定一起设骗局对付贵利王。

programme.title: 花心大少
programme.desc: 严钱声是一名自恃追女高手的富家花花公子，被母亲劝喻要成家立室。他在寻找生命中的女主角时，被两个追女高手挑战。到底他最后能否找到心中最爱?

programme.title: Unicornasaurus / The Grumple Games
programme.desc: Dora helps Benny and Uni the Unicornasaurus get their magic paintbrush back so he can be reunited with his pet, Bunnicorn. // Dora teams up with Hearty the Grumple so she can finally compete in the Grumple Games.

programme.title: Little Dora's Big Adventure / Bye Bye Balloon
programme.desc: Big Red Chicken accidentally shrinks Dora and Boots so it's up to Dora's little brother and sister to help get them big again. // Dora rescues Boots and her friends from Benny's out-of-control balloon so they can all go to La Reina's castle party.

programme.title: Innovation Melting Pot / Make Up Your Mind Barbazoo
programme.desc: The Barbababies want to invent like Leonardo da Vinci. // The Barbababies must choose between going to the pool or going for a bike ride.

programme.title: Rebels / Barbascience
programme.desc: Barbidur and Barbalala become little rebels. // But who are the Barbapapa?

programme.title: The Barbababies Have Got Talent / Triple Switcheroo
programme.desc: Every barbababy is invited to show their greatest talent on stage. // Video games are fun, but you also need to know how to enjoy the nice weather!

programme.title: Vandal! / Tumbles, Where Did You Go?
programme.desc: Barbidur catches a mysterious masked vandal. // Tototutu, Barbidur's favorite little car, has mysteriously disappeared.

programme.title: I'm Not A Barbababy Anymore / Roboxman
programme.desc: No! It's over! Barbidur is no longer a baby, he's a big boy now! // The barbababies are going to the hypermarket for the first time.

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Winter Wonderland / The Crew Builds A Giant Snow Squirrely Whirly
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew work together to transform Builder Cove's beach boardwalk into a bright, festive winter wonderland. // When a snow day gets in the way of Motor & Mix's Super Squirrely Whirly plans, Rubble & Crew do what they do best... build!

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Hotel / The Crew Builds A Hiking Trail
programme.desc: Builder Cove gets its first hotel when Farmer Zoe's cousin Hadley comes to visit. But will Hadley approve of the new hotel?// After a hiking trail mix-up confuses everyone going to Mr. Ducky-Doo's birthday party, the pups help them get back on track.

programme.title: Pups Save Jake / Pups Save the Parade
programme.desc: Jake and Chase go deep cave spelunking when Jake ends up getting his ankle stuck between some fallen rocks! // Adventure Bay Parade Day goes awry when Alex puts too many balloons on Katie's bathtub float. It literally "floats" away!

programme.title: Pups Save the Diving Bell / Pups Save the Beavers
programme.desc: While the Turbots are deep sea diving, their diving bell ends up stuck! PAW Patrol to the rescue! // A storm washes away a beaver's dam, so he chomps all the wood at Farmer Yumi's! The PAW Patrol arrives to help rebuild his home!

programme.title: The Grass is Always Greener... / When I Grow Up
programme.desc: Barbabright coats the house in magic product to prevent water leakage. The next day, The house deflates like a balloon. // A bird builds its nest on Barbazoo's belly. Barbazoo wants to become a big tree to shelter animals. This becomes complicated.

programme.title: The Cave Barbapapas / The Little Monsters
programme.desc: The barbababies discover a strange cave. Barbalib tells the story of the caves Barbapapa and how they transformed. // The Barbababies have a sleepover in the living room. Fearing the monsters in the closet, they set up wacky traps to catch them.

programme.title: Movie
programme.desc: Tim tries to make his own Captain DinoStar movie.

programme.title: Vinny
programme.desc: Tim fakes it to prove he's just as cool as Kai's cousin.

programme.title: Rocket Race
programme.desc: Tommy is in a Rocket Race, Tim supports his brother.

programme.title: The Crew And Skye Build A Mountain Lodge
programme.desc: Skye visits Rubble & Crew from Adventure Bay when their construction project needs some aerial support. But when Speed Meister tries to beat the pups to finish the job, Skye, Rubble, and the rest of the crew jump into rescue mode to save the day!

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Pirate Ship Cafe / The Crew Builds A Sierra Sparkle Experience
programme.desc: When Cafe Carl's pirate-themed restaurant gets caught in rough waters, the pups set sail with a new construction solution. // Sierra Sparkle calls in help from Rubble & Crew to build a special experience for all her fans in Builder Cove.

programme.title: Catch The Quickatoo / Lost Lorito
programme.desc: Abuela shows Dora her photo album of birds, with one page blank: the Quickatoo. Dora vows to find the Quickatoo and get a picture to complete the album. // Dora and Boots help a baby parrot named Lorito find his Mami, but he can't stop copying Boots!

programme.title: Toy Trouble!
programme.desc: The Axle City toy store has an amazing machine that can make any toy you want! But when Crusher uses it, he makes giant toys that run amok! Only Blaze and Watts can stop the giant toys from making a giant mess!

programme.title: Stuck On You / Pest Friend
programme.desc: Daisy worries she and Winston will be stuck together forever when they get tangled in Winston's jump rope. // Daisy and Mr. Crocodile try to help Roland find a best friend to take to an acorn show.

programme.title: Barba TV / The Museum
programme.desc: The barbababies are glued to the TV. Since they love it so much, their parents encourage them to make their own shows. // The Barbapapa visit the museum of evolution. On the program: creation of the Earth, Precambrian submarine and... dinosaurs!

programme.title: Barbazoo Can't Say ''No'' / The Doppelganger
programme.desc: Barbazoo is ready to help. But Barbabright and Barbabelle abuse his kindness and drive him crazy. // By chance, Barbazoo realizes he can imitate Barbapapa. He uses this opportunity to distribute chores to his brothers and sisters. Will they find out?

programme.title: Spaceland / New Rocket / Babysitting
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy and Tia get lost at a play centre. // Tim tries to find a new rocket that's perfect for him. // Tim tries to bend all the rules when Terri comes to babysit.

programme.title: Arcade Adventure
programme.desc: Blaze, AJ, and Sparkle are at the arcade-and Sparkle's got her eye on an amazing glitter rocket! But, when she doesn't have enough tickets for the rocket, the friends must jump inside different video games and win enough tickets to collect the prize!

programme.title: Pickleworld!
programme.desc: It's Pickleworld! The coolest, most pickle-riffic theme park in ALL of Axle City. Too bad Pickle's family got lost on the way there! In their briniest adventure yet, it's up to Blaze and Pickle to rescue the family and bring them back to the park.

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Fancy Drive-Thru Restaurant / The Crew Builds A Castle Show
programme.desc: When Camila the truck driver needs a place to stop and eat, the pups and Cafe Carl have a fancy idea. But is it too fancy? // Park Ranger Rose and Rosie the goat are putting on a show! But when Rosie disappears, can the pups find her before showtime?

programme.title: The Crew and Chase Are On The Case
programme.desc: There's a mystery afoot in Builder Cove! When the sculpture of all the townsfolk suddenly disappears, Chase joins Rubble & Crew to solve the case of the missing statue...and build a brand new Science Center to help investigate.

programme.title: Pups Vs. Ouchy Paws / Pups Save a Glow-in-the-Dark Party
programme.desc: Sid Swashbuckle pretends to be a legendary ghost so that he can take Danny's new skateboard. // Ryder and the Pups race to save Mayor Goodway's Glow-in-the-Dark Party guests when a frightened Alien Boy zaps them into floating space bubbles.

programme.title: Pups Stop a Super Shaker / Pups Save a Flying Farmhouse
programme.desc: Farmer Al's harvest machine goes haywire and shakes up Adventure Bay, even threatening to rock the Lookout off its foundation. // Farmer Al has a wild dream that the Paw Patrol must rescue he and Yumi when his animals start acting like humans.

programme.title: The Rainforest Ritmo / The Magic Nut
programme.desc: Isa's throwing a party where everyone will be dancing the Rainforest Ritmo. Boots has to learn the dance before they get there! // Dora leads everyone into the Tricky Trappy Forest to recover Tico's magic nut that can turn into your favorite food.

programme.title: Rainforest Race
programme.desc: Dora and Boots race their boxcar against Croc Racers in the Rainforest Race.

programme.title: Rocket Race
programme.desc: Tommy is in a Rocket Race, Tim supports his brother.

programme.desc: Tim distracts Tia when Tusky is in the washing machine.

programme.title: Parents
programme.desc: The kids become the parents and the parents become the kids.

programme.title: Soft Play
programme.desc: It's Richard Rabbit's birthday party and George is invited, and that can only mean one thing; Soft Play!

programme.title: The Market
programme.desc: Peppa and family find some great things to buy from the market and even get a special gift from Mr. Fox's stall.

programme.title: Peppa Goes to Paris
programme.desc: Peppa and family go on an exciting trip to Paris to see the sights and meet Delphine Donkey and her family.

programme.title: George's New Clothes
programme.desc: George, Peppa and Mummy Pig head off to Miss Rabbit's clothes shop to get George some brand new clothes.

programme.title: Canal Boat
programme.desc: It's Captain Daddy Dog's birthday and Mummy Dog surprises him with the gift of a boat trip, which isn't quite what he expected.

programme.title: Grandpa Pig's Greenhouse
programme.desc: Grandpa Pig and Grandpa Dog are showing and sharing their lovely, tomato filled, Greenhouses to Peppa and George.

programme.title: Sailing Boat
programme.desc: Grandpa Pig is taking Peppa and George sailing, but they keep getting stuck in the mud!

programme.title: Masks
programme.desc: Madame Gazelle has got another task for the children; making masks!

programme.title: Molly Mole
programme.desc: It is Molly Mole's first day at school and she quickly makes best friends with Peppa and Rebecca Rabbit.

programme.title: One Last For The Road / The Little Critters
programme.desc: The Barbababies love bedtime stories, except if they are always the same... // Barbabelle had a restless night because of all the insects!

programme.title: Barbazoo's Diary / The Great Reporter
programme.desc: Barbazoo have plenty of things to write about in his diary! // After reading the biography of Nellie Bly, Barbalib is determined to become a Great Reporter!

programme.title: Tiny Croc / Camping Croc
programme.desc: Daisy and Mr. Crocodile find a tiny lizard who wants to be just like Mr. Crocodile. // Winston tries to be the leader on a nature hike, but his high-tech gadget gets everyone lost in the woods.

programme.title: Robot Power
programme.desc: When Crusher unleashes three of his most destructive creations on Axle City, there's only one hero strong enough to save the day: Robot Blaze!

programme.title: The Pickle Family Campout
programme.desc: When all the members of Pickle's family get lost in the woods, Pickle teams up with Tow Truck Blaze to come to their rescue!

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Fancy Drive-Thru Restaurant / The Crew Builds A Castle Show
programme.desc: When Camila the truck driver needs a place to stop and eat, the pups and Cafe Carl have a fancy idea. But is it too fancy? // Park Ranger Rose and Rosie the goat are putting on a show! But when Rosie disappears, can the pups find her before showtime?

programme.title: The Crew And Skye Build A Mountain Lodge
programme.desc: Skye visits Rubble & Crew from Adventure Bay when their construction project needs some aerial support. But when Speed Meister tries to beat the pups to finish the job, Skye, Rubble, and the rest of the crew jump into rescue mode to save the day!

programme.title: Pups Save the Gliding Turbots / Pups Save a Plane
programme.desc: Francois & Cap'n Turbot become stranded on a remote island,Ryder and the pups fly in to find and rescue the cousins. // It's a double daring mid air rescue as Mayor Goodway's first flying lesson goes sideways,the Pups make sure everyone lands safely.

programme.title: Pups Save a Frozen Camp-out / Pups Save the Fizzy Pickles
programme.desc: Alex and Mr. Porter are on a tropical Island camping trip when a freak snowstorm hits! // Mr. Porter is delivering his famous fizzy pickles to people around town when a bumpy road shakes up the deliveries and causes the pickle jars to POP.

programme.title: The Cave Barbapapas / The Little Monsters
programme.desc: The barbababies discover a strange cave. Barbalib tells the story of the caves Barbapapa and how they transformed. // The Barbababies have a sleepover in the living room. Fearing the monsters in the closet, they set up wacky traps to catch them.

programme.title: The Perfect Dinner / The Kittens
programme.desc: Barbapapa and Barbamama go out to celebrate their birthdays. Barbabelle is in charge and gets overwhelmed. // Barbabelle watches Bali's kittens. She's scared something will happen and won't let them out. Barbamama must intervene to help the kittens.

programme.title: Explorer / Happy Parky / Storm
programme.desc: Tim explores Rumbleton to find somewhere he can have fun alone. // Tim and Kai try to give Parky the best day ever. // When a storm keeps the Rexes at home they must think of a game to pass the time.

programme.title: Super Dad / Time Out / Cookies
programme.desc: Tim sets out to prove Kai's Dad is Captain DinoStar // Tim tries to relax, but Tia has other ideas // Tim gets the best cookies in town but soon finds that others need them more than him

programme.title: Dora's Song For Papi / Pirate Piggies
programme.desc: Dora travels across the rainforest, creating a song for her dad so they can celebrate Papi-Dora day!/Dora is ready for the Churro Fiesta when the Pirate Piggies eat all the churros. Dora tracks down a treasure chest of golden churros to save the day!

programme.title: Abuela's Quinceanera / Story Time
programme.desc: Dora finds out that her Abuela never had a quinceańera and throws her a super-secret surprise party with a special dress, tiara, and shoes! // Dora's friend Coco doesn't have a story for Story Time, so they go to the Tall Tale Tree in search of one!

programme.title: Thunderstorm
programme.desc: Peppa and George are having a picnic, when a thunderstorm starts. They go inside, but Peppa and George are still scared because the thunderstorm is making lots of noise.

programme.title: Cleaning the Car
programme.desc: Peppa and her family have to wash the car when it gets dirty.

programme.title: Lunch
programme.desc: Peppa and George visit Granny Pig and Grandpa Pig's house for lunch. Granny Pig has made a salad but George doesn't like vegetables, so Grandpa Pig makes the salad into a dinosaur shape to help George eat his salad.

programme.title: Camping
programme.desc: Peppa and her family go camping, but Daddy Pig is too big to get into the tent. Daddy Pig likes sleeping under the stars, until it starts to rain.

programme.title: Sleepy Princess
programme.desc: Daddy Pig tells Peppa and George a story about a princess who needs sleep. In the story, Peppa is the princess, George is the prince, Mummy Pig is the queen, and Daddy Pig is the king.

programme.title: The Tree House
programme.desc: Peppa and George visit Granny Pig and Grandpa Pig's house. Grandpa Pig has built a tree house for them.

programme.title: Fancy Dress Party
programme.desc: Peppa and George are having a costume party. Peppa is a fairy princess, and George is a dinosaur. Peppa has to pick which of her friends is wearing the best costume.

programme.title: AJ to the Rescue
programme.desc: Blaze and AJ are racing through the jungle when Blaze gets trapped in super sticky mud! Now it's up to AJ and his new animal friends, to go on an epic adventure to save Blaze!

programme.title: Pups Find a Genie / Pups Save a Tightrope Walker
programme.desc: Rubble finds an old brass Jack in the Box, with a genie inside who grants him three wishes! // Francois Turbot is bravely walking a tightrope, but seagulls threaten to ruin his act. Time to call the PAW Patrol!

programme.title: Pups Save a Runaway Rooster
programme.desc: Chickaletta and Roosterio run away from a chicken show and get stuck on top of a runaway drone.

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Fancy Drive-Thru Restaurant / The Crew Builds A Castle Show
programme.desc: When Camila the truck driver needs a place to stop and eat, the pups and Cafe Carl have a fancy idea. But is it too fancy? // Park Ranger Rose and Rosie the goat are putting on a show! But when Rosie disappears, can the pups find her before showtime?

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Sierra Sparkle Space Show
programme.desc: Charger can't wait to help Sierra Sparkle with her big show! Well, until his hurt paw causes a cone complication.

programme.title: Safety Croc / Good Sport Croc
programme.desc: When Daisy skins her knee learning to skateboard, Mr. Crocodile tries to keep her from ever getting another booboo. // Good sports Mr. Crocodile and Daisy face off in a game of soccer with bad sport Winston.

programme.title: Dreams And Illusions / Dreaming Apprentices
programme.desc: While everyone sleeps peacefully, one may wonder what the Barbababies could be dreaming about. // To dream makes you grow... But what can Barbidur, Barbalala, Barbotine and Barbidou possibly dream of?

programme.title: The Barbapapa Tree
programme.desc: Barbapapa and Barbamama return to the tree they were born under. It's in bad condition. They must rescue it quickly without disturbing the nearby animals

programme.title: Hat
programme.desc: Grandma gives Tim a hat she made herself, unfortunately it keeps getting in the way.

programme.title: Roadtrip
programme.desc: The Rex family go on a road trip through the galaxy to get to Rocket World.

programme.title: Tickets
programme.desc: Tim & Kai compete to get Terri's spare Space-Land ticket.

programme.title: Talent Show
programme.desc: Tim, Tia & Tommy decide to put on a talent show, but then they can't decide who should go first...

programme.title: The Playground
programme.desc: Peppa and George go to the playground. Peppa's friends are also there. Peppa likes going on the swings but George does not because he's scared of heights, so Daddy Pig helps George go down the slide because it is too high and ends up getting stuck.

programme.title: Daddy Puts Up a Picture
programme.desc: Daddy Pig offers to put up a picture of Peppa and George on the wall while Mummy Pig is out. He accidentally cracks the wall while doing it, so Peppa and George help Daddy Pig fix the wall before Mummy Pig comes home.

programme.title: At the Beach
programme.desc: Peppa and her family go to the beach, and they do lots of things there including burying Daddy Pig in the sand. When it's time to go they almost leave without Daddy Pig as he has fallen asleep.

programme.title: Mister Skinnylegs
programme.desc: George finds a spider in the bathroom sink, but Peppa is really frightened-until she realizes that it doesn't want to hurt her.

programme.title: Daddy Gets Fit
programme.desc: Peppa instructs Daddy Pig to do lots of exercise to do as he is a bit fat. Daddy Pig is horrified to learn you have to exercise every day to get fit.

programme.title: Tidying Up
programme.desc: Peppa and George have to tidy their bedroom. After a frenzy of cleaning, the room is tidy. The room doesn't stay tidy for long though.

programme.title: Boris / Born To Be Wild
programme.desc: The barbababies find a lost baby elephant and secretly look after it. How will Barbapapa and Barbamama react to Boris? // Boris the elephant misses home. The Barbapapa decide to bring him back to Africa. On the spot, they help Boris to acclimatize.

programme.title: Moving Mission
programme.desc: During a walk, the Barbapapa family discovers a megalith.

programme.title: Truckball Team-Up
programme.desc: Blaze discovers an exciting new sport called Truckball. But when Crusher and his team of cronies challenge him, Blaze must scour all of Axle City to put together a Truckball team before the big game.

programme.desc: Uncle Otis accidentally slips and tosses Julia and Julius's new goldfish, Marigold, into the river. // When Ms. Marjorie and Mr. Park don wingsuits to see a rare flower, a flying squirrel sends them off course!

programme.desc: Farmer Al's sheep runaway and Mayor Humdinger's kittens go missing.

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Bowling Alley / The Crew Builds A Superbloom Path
programme.desc: Rubble & the pups find Grandpa Gravel's lucky bowling ball. Too bad Builder Cove doesn't have a bowling alley... until now! // When a sudden superbloom traps Motor, Lily, and Park Ranger Rose, the pups need a flower-friendly construction solution.

programme.title: Singin' in the Tub / Show and Share
programme.desc: Dora and Boots help Benny gain the confidence to sing at the Canta Conmigo show. // Dora helps Boots find a special Heart Banana to show everyone at Show and Share.

programme.desc: The Barbababies decide to create a show and go all out! // Barbotine wants to create the best lemonade.

programme.desc: Barbapapa tells the Barbababies about his extraordinary encounter with a wolf. // Tomorrow is the Barbababies' first day of school.

programme.desc: Barbapapa and Barbamama return to the tree they were born under. It's in bad condition. They must rescue it quickly without disturbing the nearby animals. // It's the Barbababies's birthday. They all want to do something different with Barbapapa!

programme.desc: Rubble & Crew build a kangaroo safari for Lucas and Lily right in the Bark Yard... until their construction kangaroo hops away! // Speed Meister challenges Rubble & Crew to compete in the ultimate build-off: Builder Cove's first Construction Games!

programme.desc: Barbapapa and Barbamama go out to celebrate their birthdays. Barbabelle is in charge and gets overwhelmed. // Barbabelle watches Bali's kittens. She's scared something will happen and won't let them out. Barbamama must intervene to help the kittens.

programme.desc: Tim tries out some new rocket boots which soon fly out of control.

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Ballpark / The Crew Builds A Surf Bridge
programme.desc: When Rubble's favorite baseball star Aaron Judge can't get out of town to the home run derby, Rubble & Crew build a stadium to hold the derby right in Builder Cove! // Surf's up for Rubble & Crew! Well, if they can get over the super hot sand, it is.

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Reuse-It Station / The Crew Builds A Duck Bridge
programme.desc: When Speed Meister builds his own station for reusing trash, the pups have to clean up the mess all over Builder Cove. // After a baby duckling follows them home, Rubble & Crew use their construction know-how to bring the duckling back to its home.

programme.title: Rainbow's Lost Colors / Boots' Rubber Band Ball
programme.desc: The twins are excited to see their first rainbow, but it's missing its colors! Dora sets off to return its azul, rojo, y amarillo. // Boots' rubber band ball bounces into the Forest Next Door, and he must ask Cynthia the Centipede to get it back.

programme.title: Ice Cream Monster Machine
programme.desc: Gasquatch invites Blaze and AJ to his ice cream party! But he forgot something important - the ice cream! So, Blaze transforms into an Ice Cream Truck and races to reach Gasquatch's house in time!

programme.title: Lucky Croc / Sleepover Croc
programme.desc: Daisy and Mr. Crocodile search for a lucky item to help them win a bike raffle. // When Mr. Crocodile can't fall asleep at his first sleepover, Daisy helps him figure out why.

programme.title: Barbabravo Is Not Feeling Well / Be Patient Barbabravo...
programme.desc: Following a misadventure, Barbabravo is unable to transform at all. The whole family unites to help him. // Barbabravo can't stay put and is unable to focus one an activity for very long. Barbalala offers to teach him control. Will she succeed?

programme.title: The Seven Foods / The Perfect Portrait
programme.desc: The Barbababies think their food can make them change colours and shapes. They decide to find the right food for each of them. // Barbabeau lacks inspiration, he can't create anymore. The whole family helps by suggesting new subjects to paint.

programme.title: Treasure / Roar / Mammoth
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy, Tia and Grandma go on the search for treasure. // It's the Roar Festival, and Tim wants to have the best Roar in town. // Tim, Tommy and Tia find a lost mammoth in their house.

programme.title: Super Slide Trophy
programme.desc: Blaze and Gasquatch compete to win the Super Slide Trophy! But when they run into problems along the way, Gasquatch knows just how to solve them... with mud!

programme.title: Wild West Heroes
programme.desc: Yeehaw! Blaze, AJ, and Starla are on their way to a Wild West Picnic! But when the Lunchbox Bandit steals everyone's lunchboxes, it's up to our Wild West Heroes to get them back!

programme.title: The Crew Fixes The Talent Show Stage / The Crew Builds Instruments
programme.desc: When Speed Meister sabotages the stage for the town Talent Show, the pups use Motor's talent to save the day. // Sierra Sparkle is coming to sing for Builder Cove Day! But when the band's instruments break, Rubble & Crew have a construction solution.

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Giant Dam / The Crew Builds A Squirrel-Proof Farm
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew are on the job to save Builder Cove after a rainstorm threatens to flood the town. // Rubble and Motor come up with crafty construction solutions to fix Farmer Zoe's squirrel problem before the Farm Fair.

programme.title: Pups Save a Box Fort / Pups Save Travelin' Travis From Really Big Bill!
programme.desc: The Pups must save Rocky and Humdinger from a runaway box fort. // When Skye helps Traveling Travis search for Big Bill Island, the misguided explorer gets carried away by a really, really big bird.

programme.title: Dancing with Luke Stars! / Pups Save a Mischievous Octopus
programme.desc: A dance contest being judged by Luke Stars goes wrong when a floating dancefloor carries the contestants away. // The pups investigate a mystery at an undersea-themed museum exhibit and discover an octopus that wants to return to the ocean

programme.title: Tiny Dancer / The Sleepy Sun
programme.desc: Dora shows the twins a music box with a baila folklorico dancer who comes to life! Bailarina's adelita boots run away, so we need to get them back. // The sun won't set because it can't fall asleep! Dora needs to find Pillow Cloud so Sol can set.

programme.title: Bok Bok Birthday
programme.desc: Dora and Boots secretly hand out Big Red Chicken's birthday invites to all their friends in time for his birthday party.

programme.title: Boots
programme.desc: Tim tries out some new rocket boots which soon fly out of control.

programme.title: Moon Parrot
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy and Tia bird-sit the Bronte's MoonParrot.

programme.title: Tailball
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy and Tia take on their parents at Tailball.

programme.title: Police Station
programme.desc: Oh, no! George has lost Mr. Dinosaur! Maybe the police can help George find him.

programme.title: Suzy Sheep Goes Away
programme.desc: Mummy Sheep gets the news that she has got a new job far away, leaving Suzy and Peppa to wonder how they're going to carry on being best friends!

programme.title: Stamps
programme.desc: Grandpa Pig is showing Peppa and George his extensive stamp collection, which inspires them to send a postcard of their own!

programme.title: When I grow up
programme.desc: It's time for playgroup and today Peppa and friends are deciding what they might like to be when they grow up.

programme.title: Madame Gazelle's House
programme.desc: Peppa, George, Mummy and Daddy Pig have gone to visit Madame Gazelle and her wonky house!

programme.title: Grandpa Pig's Pond
programme.desc: Peppa, George are helping Grandpa pig to dig a brand new pond for his garden!

programme.title: Tiny Land
programme.desc: It's time for a day out and Peppa, George, Mummy Pig, Daddy Pig and Suzy Sheep all go to visit Tiny Land.

programme.title: Long Train Journey
programme.desc: Daddy Pig receives a letter saying he must go away on business to test some very important concrete!

programme.title: Once Upon a Time
programme.desc: Peppa and family go on a walk through the forests where they meet all their favourite fairytale characters.

programme.title: Private Club / Green Algae
programme.desc: Barbabeau, Barbabelle, and Barbabright have built a treehouse. // Barbamama is determined to stop a foul pollution.

programme.title: The Invasion / Prank Day
programme.desc: Barbalala receives a package and discovers little pink animals inside, which she calls the SQUEAKIES. // Barbabravo, Barbalala and Barbabeau are fed up with their brothers and sisters laughing at their expense.

programme.title: Pretend Friend / Croc Outta Water
programme.desc: When Winston won't play with Lydia, Daisy and Mr. Crocodile create an imaginary friend for her. // Mr. Crocodile helps Daisy fish-sit for Martin, but worries he won't be able to stop himself from eating it.

programme.title: The Chicken Circus!
programme.desc: Blaze, AJ, and Darington are in the front row for the amazing Chicken Circus! But when Crusher accidentally launches the chickens far, far away, it's up to Blaze and Darington to get their feathered friends back to the big top!

programme.title: Ninja Blaze
programme.desc: Ninja Master Blackbelt is training Blaze and AJ to be powerful ninjas when Crusher and Pickle accidentally launch themselves onto an icy mountain! Now Blaze and AJ must use their new ninjas skills to rescue them.

programme.title: The Crew Builds Mr. Ducky-Doo A Special Diving Board / The Crew Builds A Rainwater Tank
programme.desc: Mayor Greatway asks Rubble & Crew to build something special for her friend Mr. Ducky-Doo. But soon a construction mystery is afoot... // Rubble & Crew work to build a rain tank for Farmer Zoe before a storm, until a chicken complication crops up.

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Ballpark / The Crew Builds A Surf Bridge
programme.desc: When Rubble's favorite baseball star Aaron Judge can't get out of town to the home run derby, Rubble & Crew build a stadium to hold the derby right in Builder Cove! // Surf's up for Rubble & Crew! Well, if they can get over the super hot sand, it is.

programme.title: Pups Save a Giant Plant / Pups Get Stuck
programme.desc: Buddy - Mayor Goodway's gesture of goodwill gift grows wildly out of control when it's planted in the wrong place. Time for a transplant! // Metal mayhem ensues when Marshall's Fire Truck becomes mysteriously magnetized.

programme.title: Pups Save a Pluck-O-Matic / Pups Save a Mascot
programme.desc: Yumi's new Robo- Corn Plucker goes haywire, and Ryder and the Paw Patrol must get it under control. // Daring Danny X, dressed as a "Bird X" mascot for the Adventure Bay, gets carried away by a couple of eagles who mistake him for one of their own!

programme.title: The Treasure Hunt / Going into the Wild
programme.desc: Mr. Strict's twins visit the barbababies. The barbababies organize a treasure hunt for the twins and enjoy the great outdoors. // The Barbapapas are off to a new adventure... in the garden. But living in nature is more complicated than they expected.

programme.title: The Fuchsia Ocean / Zero Waste
programme.desc: Chemical sprays are making the countryside rosy! The Barbapapas' build an aviary to protect sick birds. // When they see a beach covered with rubbish, the Barbapapa family decides to clean the beach and use the trash to make a miniature golf course.

programme.title: Beach Scanner / Tidy / Pets
programme.desc: Tim and Kai try to uncover trinkets buried at the beach. // Tim has a clearout of all his old stuff, but soon finds not all of it is destined for the rubbish bin. // Tim, Tia and Tommy try to convince Mum and Dad to let them have a pet.

programme.title: Roadtrip / Tickets / Talent Show
programme.desc: The Rex family go on a road trip through the galaxy to get to Rocket World // Tim & Kai compete to get Terri's spare Space-Land ticket // Tim, Tia & Tommy decide to put on a talent show, but then they can't decide who should go first...

programme.title: Run Cynthia Run / Dora In Space
programme.desc: Dora and Boots get help from Carmelo the Condor to fix their friend's running shoes in time for the rainforest race! // Dora and Boots rescue Tico from space after his spaceship falls apart!

programme.title: Backpack's Charm / Lost Banana Blankie
programme.desc: Dora and Boots help Backpack find her lost friendship charm and make it even better than before! // Dora helps Boots find his lost banana blankie before it's bedtime at the sleepover party!

programme.title: The Museum
programme.desc: Peppa and her family go to the museum. Peppa imagines herself as a Queen in the King and Queen's room. George imagines being a big dinosaur in the Dinosaur Room.

programme.title: Very Hot Day
programme.desc: It is a super hot day, and all the mud puddles have dried up, so Peppa and George play in the wading pool.

programme.title: Chloe's Puppet Show
programme.desc: Peppa and George visit their cousin Chloe's house, where they put on a puppet show about a pig who snores a lot. Daddy Pig and Uncle Pig miss the show as they are too busy snoring.

programme.title: Daddy Gets Fit
programme.desc: Peppa instructs Daddy Pig to do lots of exercise to do as he is a bit fat. Daddy Pig is horrified to learn you have to exercise every day to get fit.

programme.title: Tidying Up
programme.desc: Peppa and George have to tidy their bedroom. After a frenzy of cleaning, the room is tidy. The room doesn't stay tidy for long though.

programme.title: The Playground
programme.desc: Peppa and George go to the playground. Peppa's friends are also there. Peppa likes going on the swings but George does not because he's scared of heights, so Daddy Pig helps George go down the slide because it is too high and ends up getting stuck.

programme.title: Daddy Puts Up a Picture
programme.desc: Daddy Pig offers to put up a picture of Peppa and George on the wall while Mummy Pig is out. He accidentally cracks the wall while doing it, so Peppa and George help Daddy Pig fix the wall before Mummy Pig comes home.

programme.title: The Trophy Chase
programme.desc: The Championship Race is about to start, and all the fastest trucks in town are ready to roll! But when Crusher steals the trophy before the race even begins, it's up to Blaze and his friends to get it back in time.

programme.title: Pups Save a Goldrush / Pups Save the Paw Patroller
programme.desc: When a grizzled old prospector discovers gold in Adventure Bay, it's a bona fide, dog gone, gold rush! // When Mayor Humdinger and the Kit-tastrophe Crew try to steal the Paw Patroller, the chase becomes a rescue!

programme.title: Pups Save a Snowbound Cow
programme.desc: When Bettina wanders up Jake's mountain and gets caught in a snowstorm, it's up to the Paw Patrol to bring her safely down.

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Bridge
programme.desc: Rubble and his construction pup family gear up to build a bridge, only to find the villainous Speed Meister has a different idea. It's up to Rubble & Crew to work together and save the day by building a new, safe bridge to Builder Cove.

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Giant Duck Plane
programme.desc: A flock of migrating ducks settles in Builder Cove! It's up to Rubble & Crew to help the ducks start moving south.

programme.title: Big Help Croc / Pom Pom
programme.desc: Mr. Crocodile volunteers to help too many friends with their projects all at the same time. // Daisy and Mr. Crocodile invite a new friend, PomPom, to live with them.

programme.title: Ah! My Beautiful Castle / The Sand Is Running Away
programme.desc: During a bike ride, the Barbapapa family discovers an old medieval castle in ruins. // Barbapapa and Lolita were traveling in a balloon, but caught in a storm they ended up stranded on a deserted island.

programme.title: 试真D
programme.desc: 主持江美仪畅游深圳、珠海、惠州、东莞、潮州、汕头等广东省不同地方，每站联同周嘉洛、朱敏瀚、曾展望、吴业坤当中两位男拍档，以顾客的身分测试多款美食可会有「伏」，探索各式玩乐景点值得光顾与否，为香港观众提供贴地的参考指数。

programme.title: 春闺梦里人
programme.desc: 季曼失忆后阴差阳错成宁钰轩夫人，凭智慧与经商逆转命运，并助夫君平乱获皇帝封赏。二人联手铲除恶势力与阴谋，历经坠崖分离与重逢，最终共度风雨终成眷属。

programme.title: 流行都市
programme.desc: 《流行都市》为观众介绍时令产品、健康养生、健体运动、护肤化妆、时尚服饰、婴幼儿护理、育儿知识、城中美食、饲养宠物等潮流资讯，内容包罗万有！

programme.title: 快乐长门人
programme.desc: 节目请来专业医生及中医，详细探讨长者要注意的疾病及都市病，提供预防及治疗的方法。营养师讲解饮食知识，从饮食中学习养生之道。

programme.title: 港生活．港享受
programme.desc: 香港人生活多姿多采，《港生活．港享受》既呈献高贵典雅的品味生活，也会带来贴地亲民的优质享受。节目结合多元化主题，每集探索不同范畴，并请来各行各业的精英分享成功之道。

programme.title: 东张西望
programme.desc: 《东张西望》星期一至日，紧贴追踪社会大事、趣闻逸事，并报导娱乐圈最新动态、艺人消息，以及剧集宣传和花絮。「今日突发」环节为大家追踪即日热门新闻；专题环节，深入探讨大众关心的时事、社会及民生问题，并访问相关的专家。

programme.title: 香港早晨 及 世界观
programme.desc: 报道香港、两岸及国际重要新闻。

programme.title: 谈判专家
programme.desc: 彭国栋与简洁是「警察谈判小组」内的梦幻组合，合作从未失手。私底下，栋对洁之大女人作风却不以为然。谈判小组招募新一届谈判专家，栋与洁各持己见。

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 熊树根是小型运输公司东主，与次女若水、三女心如以及长女的儿子金城安同住旧楼，惟心如与若水经常争吵，教树根哭笑不得。树根无视众人反对，力邀不修边幅的亲弟树仁搬来同住，怎料树仁竟无意间招惹了鬼魂龙璟风，令熊家出现翻天覆地的转变！

programme.title: Hands Up
programme.desc: 儿童节目《Hands Up》鼓励小朋友勇于发问，表达自我，向目标进发！吉祥物「酱汁家族」成员跟一众主持演出短剧，陪伴大家度过愉快时光。另会带来多首儿歌，让孩子们边唱边学习生活知识。

programme.title: 试真D & 今日知多D
programme.desc: 主持江美仪畅游深圳、珠海、惠州、东莞、潮州、汕头等广东省不同地方，每站联同周嘉洛、朱敏瀚、曾展望、吴业坤当中两位男拍档，以顾客的身分测试多款美食可会有「伏」，探索各式玩乐景点值得光顾与否，为香港观众提供贴地的参考指数。

programme.title: 教煮争霸
programme.desc: 当「鼎爷」李家鼎、「三姐」萧秀香刚柔相遇，意味着一场全新的厨房大战蓄势待发！每集由嘉宾为鼎爷与三姐出题，当中包括著名厨师、识食艺人等，务求让两人以相同食材或主题，烹调出各具风格的菜式，比试同时分享煮食心得。

programme.title: Holistic Way及京都念慈庵呈献: 正义女神
programme.desc: 高等法院法官言惠知调查一宗14岁少年高成彬涉嫌导致6岁男童坠亡案件时，发现其多次犯罪却因年龄未被追责。她主动降职至少年法庭裁判官通过引导教育帮助问题少年。

programme.title: 东张西望
programme.desc: 《东张西望》星期一至日，紧贴追踪社会大事、趣闻逸事，并报导娱乐圈最新动态、艺人消息，以及剧集宣传和花絮。「今日突发」环节为大家追踪即日热门新闻；专题环节，深入探讨大众关心的时事、社会及民生问题，并访问相关的专家。

programme.title: 兄弟帮
programme.desc: 《兄弟帮》是由一班「好兄弟」林盛斌、梁竞徽、王梓轩、范振锋及陈国峰主持的年青人清谈节目，每集邀请歌手、艺人或不同界别人士作嘉宾，进行轻松访谈，带来时下社会热话、流行文化、潮流玩意等多元化内容。

programme.title: 吴邪私家笔记 & 今日知多D
programme.desc: 吴邪解读帛书地图，与三叔组队探古墓，遇怪兽、铜鱼揭三叔往事，神秘女子阿宁现身后三叔失踪，新冒险展开。

programme.title: 美食新闻报道
programme.desc: 香港汇聚环球美食，特色佳肴、贴地料理受到识饮识食之人的密切关注！黄婉曼、蔡雪莹、倪嘉雯、黄嘉雯、廖慧仪、伍倩彤等美食主播、主持，紧贴最新饮食情报与优惠，深入了解滋味背后的故事。

programme.title: 最强生命线
programme.desc: 都市人生活节奏紧张，压力又大，身体易出毛病，《最强生命线》为你解构健康之道。每集都会邀请医学专家讲解各种疾病的成因，还有物理治疗师，运动治疗师教做适当的运动。

programme.desc: 高等法院法官言惠知调查一宗14岁少年高成彬涉嫌导致6岁男童坠亡案件时，发现其多次犯罪却因年龄未被追责。她主动降职至少年法庭裁判官通过引导教育帮助问题少年。

programme.title: 吴邪私家笔记
programme.desc: 吴邪解读帛书地图，与三叔组队探古墓，遇怪兽、铜鱼揭三叔往事，神秘女子阿宁现身后三叔失踪，新冒险展开。

programme.title: 试真D
programme.desc: 主持江美仪畅游深圳、珠海、惠州、东莞、潮州、汕头等广东省不同地方，每站联同周嘉洛、朱敏瀚、曾展望、吴业坤当中两位男拍档，以顾客的身分测试多款美食可会有「伏」，探索各式玩乐景点值得光顾与否，为香港观众提供贴地的参考指数。

programme.title: 娱乐头条
programme.desc: 每晚紧贴香港娱乐圈的消息，以至世界各地的影视娱乐新闻，报道艺人最新动态、剧集和电影宣传、演唱会精华、颁奖礼盛况等，让大家瞬间掌握影视娱乐圈的动态和最新消息。

programme.title: 晚间新闻
programme.desc: 每晚报道香港、两岸、国际重要新闻以及体育消息，让你洞悉各地大事及体坛动向。

programme.title: 世界观
programme.desc: 由资深新闻工作者负责的《世界观》，带你用世界观、观世界，更阔更广看新闻、长知识。

programme.title: 兄弟帮
programme.desc: 《兄弟帮》是由一班「好兄弟」林盛斌、梁竞徽、王梓轩、范振锋及陈国峰主持的年青人清谈节目，每集邀请歌手、艺人或不同界别人士作嘉宾，进行轻松访谈，带来时下社会热话、流行文化、潮流玩意等多元化内容。

programme.title: 谈判专家
programme.desc: 彭国栋与简洁是「警察谈判小组」内的梦幻组合，合作从未失手。私底下，栋对洁之大女人作风却不以为然。谈判小组招募新一届谈判专家，栋与洁各持己见。

programme.title: Holistic Way及京都念慈庵呈献: 正义女神 & 今日知多D
programme.desc: 高等法院法官言惠知调查一宗14岁少年高成彬涉嫌导致6岁男童坠亡案件时，发现其多次犯罪却因年龄未被追责。她主动降职至少年法庭裁判官通过引导教育帮助问题少年。

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 熊树根是小型运输公司东主，与次女若水、三女心如以及长女的儿子金城安同住旧楼，惟心如与若水经常争吵，教树根哭笑不得。树根无视众人反对，力邀不修边幅的亲弟树仁搬来同住，怎料树仁竟无意间招惹了鬼魂龙璟风，令熊家出现翻天覆地的转变！

programme.title: 东张西望
programme.desc: 《东张西望》星期一至日，紧贴追踪社会大事、趣闻逸事，并报导娱乐圈最新动态、艺人消息，以及剧集宣传和花絮。「今日突发」环节为大家追踪即日热门新闻；专题环节，深入探讨大众关心的时事、社会及民生问题，并访问相关的专家。

programme.title: 试真D
programme.desc: 主持江美仪畅游深圳、珠海、惠州、东莞、潮州、汕头等广东省不同地方，每站联同周嘉洛、朱敏瀚、曾展望、吴业坤当中两位男拍档，以顾客的身分测试多款美食可会有「伏」，探索各式玩乐景点值得光顾与否，为香港观众提供贴地的参考指数。

programme.title: 春闺梦里人
programme.desc: 季曼失忆后阴差阳错成宁钰轩夫人，凭智慧与经商逆转命运，并助夫君平乱获皇帝封赏。二人联手铲除恶势力与阴谋，历经坠崖分离与重逢，最终共度风雨终成眷属。

programme.title: 流行都市
programme.desc: 《流行都市》为观众介绍时令产品、健康养生、健体运动、护肤化妆、时尚服饰、婴幼儿护理、育儿知识、城中美食、饲养宠物等潮流资讯，内容包罗万有！

programme.title: 快乐长门人
programme.desc: 节目请来专业医生及中医，详细探讨长者要注意的疾病及都市病，提供预防及治疗的方法。营养师讲解饮食知识，从饮食中学习养生之道。

programme.title: 美食新闻报道
programme.desc: 香港汇聚环球美食，特色佳肴、贴地料理受到识饮识食之人的密切关注！黄婉曼、蔡雪莹、倪嘉雯、黄嘉雯、廖慧仪、伍倩彤等美食主播、主持，紧贴最新饮食情报与优惠，深入了解滋味背后的故事。

programme.title: 东张西望
programme.desc: 《东张西望》星期一至日，紧贴追踪社会大事、趣闻逸事，并报导娱乐圈最新动态、艺人消息，以及剧集宣传和花絮。「今日突发」环节为大家追踪即日热门新闻；专题环节，深入探讨大众关心的时事、社会及民生问题，并访问相关的专家。

programme.title: 香港早晨
programme.desc: 报道香港、两岸及国际重要新闻。

programme.title: 美女厨房
programme.desc: 萧正楠、Bob和张振朗主持第三度开放的《美女厨房》。一众女艺人听完菜名及流程简介，便要动手煮出指定菜式，在烹调时更要保持神秘感，让男嘉宾猜猜她们是谁。

programme.title: 港生活．港享受
programme.desc: 香港人生活多姿多采，《港生活．港享受》既呈献高贵典雅的品味生活，也会带来贴地亲民的优质享受。节目结合多元化主题，每集探索不同范畴，并请来各行各业的精英分享成功之道。

programme.title: Hands Up
programme.desc: 儿童节目《Hands Up》鼓励小朋友勇于发问，表达自我，向目标进发！吉祥物「酱汁家族」成员跟一众主持演出短剧，陪伴大家度过愉快时光。另会带来多首儿歌，让孩子们边唱边学习生活知识。

programme.title: 迷网
programme.desc: 高级督察司徒忠隶属网络安全及科技罪案调查科。他与刚毕业的见习督察萧美婷一起联手破获各种网络诈骗案的同时，不知不觉中互生好感。

programme.title: 迷网
programme.desc: 高级督察司徒忠隶属网络安全及科技罪案调查科。他与刚毕业的见习督察萧美婷一起联手破获各种网络诈骗案的同时，不知不觉中互生好感。

programme.title: 东张西望
programme.desc: 《东张西望》星期一至日，紧贴追踪社会大事、趣闻逸事，并报导娱乐圈最新动态、艺人消息，以及剧集宣传和花絮。「今日突发」环节为大家追踪即日热门新闻；专题环节，深入探讨大众关心的时事、社会及民生问题，并访问相关的专家。

programme.title: 还原神之食
programme.desc: 文学作品中的虚构菜式，大家可有推想过是甚么味道？主持请来星级厨师，从电视剧集、电玩游戏、卡通动画、文学名著中寻找创意灵感，发掘内里提到的一些特色美食，并透过名厨的巧手，将这些看似不真实的菜式「还原」。

programme.title: 魔法伽利略
programme.desc: 《魔法伽利略》学院校长甄泽权带领两位「美女助教」冯盈盈、何依婷，藉精彩魔术表演与嘉宾互动。黎诺懿、陈敏之、泳儿、江嘉敏、林盛斌、丁子朗、戴祖仪等一众「星级学生」，欣赏神奇演出的同时，也要细心分析，从魔术、科学「二选一」！

programme.title: 周六聊Teen谷
programme.desc: 踏入科技年代，青少年对新兴电子产品、网络流行媒体尤感兴趣，追上时代步伐，已成新世代指标！主持陈星妤、陈懿德、王菲用尽所能搜罗世界各地至潮、至新情报，上至世界盛事、医学百科、文艺与科技；下至日常生活、网络热搜，跟观众一一分享。

programme.title: 中年好声音4
programme.desc: 《中年好声音4》为35岁以上热爱歌唱的人士提供舞台，鼓励他们勇敢追梦。本季扩大全球招募，覆盖粤港澳大湾区、北美、新加坡、马来西亚、澳洲等地，吸引更多来自不同背景的中年参赛者以歌声讲述自己的故事。

programme.title: 一周星星
programme.desc: 访谈节目《一周星星》，每集邀请星级艺人、界别名人，与区永权、许文轩、王镇泉等娱乐主播，分享新近工作企划，谈论电影、电视、演唱会相关的特别话题，尤其是网民与圈中朋友关心热议的人和事！

programme.title: 教煮争霸
programme.desc: 当「鼎爷」李家鼎、「三姐」萧秀香刚柔相遇，意味着一场全新的厨房大战蓄势待发！每集由嘉宾为鼎爷与三姐出题，当中包括著名厨师、识食艺人等，务求让两人以相同食材或主题，烹调出各具风格的菜式，比试同时分享煮食心得。

programme.title: 周六聊Teen谷
programme.desc: 踏入科技年代，青少年对新兴电子产品、网络流行媒体尤感兴趣，追上时代步伐，已成新世代指标！主持陈星妤、陈懿德、王菲用尽所能搜罗世界各地至潮、至新情报，上至世界盛事、医学百科、文艺与科技；下至日常生活、网络热搜，跟观众一一分享。

programme.title: 六点半新闻报导
programme.desc: 翡翠台每日下午六点半，报导本地、两岸及国际重要新闻。

programme.title: 新闻透视
programme.desc: 《新闻透视》，每周专题报道多段香港以至国际的瞩目新闻，聚焦港人最关心的民生话题，并邀请各界人士、学者、专家，一同深入探讨个中来龙去脉。

programme.title: 东张西望
programme.desc: 《东张西望》星期一至日，紧贴追踪社会大事、趣闻逸事，并报导娱乐圈最新动态、艺人消息，以及剧集宣传和花絮。「今日突发」环节为大家追踪即日热门新闻；专题环节，深入探讨大众关心的时事、社会及民生问题，并访问相关的专家。

programme.title: 退休有乜计
programme.desc: 《退休有乜计》探讨香港人如何为安稳、有意义的退休生活做好准备。节目通过真实个案、专家访谈和理财建议，分析退休究竟需要多少积蓄，强积金及其他储蓄工具的角色，并讨论六十岁后兼职工作究竟是无奈之举还是个人选择。

programme.title: 唱钱
programme.desc: 挑战音域的极限、拍子的精准，全新互动音乐游戏节目《唱钱》由森美、Eric Kwok、李茵彤任主持，以专业音准分析系统考验参赛者。九宫格代表九个难度等级，参赛者每当连成一线「过三关」，可选择提款离场、继续挑战，甚至是最难的Monster关卡。

programme.title: J Music
programme.desc: 《J Music》致力打造高质音乐平台，一众歌手有展示音乐实力的机会之余，也可让乐迷更深入了解歌手的音乐故事。节目邀请「人气」歌手担任嘉宾，由嘉宾亲自挑选其喜欢的新旧作品，并即场演唱，分享喜爱曲目。

programme.title: 美食新闻周报
programme.desc: 黄嘉雯、倪嘉雯、伍倩彤等美食主播、主持，紧贴最新美食潮流，从不同平台网罗超人气餐厅消息，主持亲自试食，带来真实食评。节目精选《美食新闻报道》介绍的多间餐厅，力推当中招牌美食，并会速递美食优惠，让观众实时掌握最滋味、抵食的饮食情报。

programme.title: 老友记
programme.desc: 贯彻有一定历史、独立经营的地道餐厅为准则，主持杨尚友精选《老友记》名单，探寻店家背后鲜为人知、满载人情味的故事，尝味一道道不平凡的招牌菜肴，并领略本港饮食文化的斗志精神。

programme.title: 唐人街探案2
programme.desc: 唐仁（王宝强饰）为巨额奖金欺骗秦风（刘昊然饰）到纽约参加世界名侦探大赛，比赛的内容是寻找杀害纽约唐人街教父七叔的孙子的凶手。两人再次组合侦破案件，并冒着生命危险闹翻纽约。

programme.title: 天才冲冲冲
programme.desc: 「寓教于乐」的大型综艺节目, 节目单元不仅推陈出新, 在生活中更能与三五好友, 一同尝试节目中的各项游戏, 亲身体验节目中的各项乐趣。

programme.title: 以爱为营
programme.desc: 财经记者郑书意（白鹿饰）为拿下头版几经努力争取和有名的年轻霸道总裁时宴（王鶴棣饰）进行采访，两人互相留下了深刻印象。最终阴差阳错的爱情慢慢升温。

programme.title: 非诚勿扰 12
programme.desc: 非诚勿扰是一档适应现代生活节奏的大型婚恋交友节目, 在广大单身男女提供了一个公开的婚恋交友平台的同时, 也迎来了新的当红男星作为新一任的非诚合伙人。

programme.title: 市井豪门
programme.desc: 一条街隔开两个世界。一边是努力生活有苦也有笑的市场人生，一边是勾心斗角有钱却战战兢兢的豪门日子。

programme.title: 声生不息·华流季
programme.desc: 以"华流国际化"为核心，《声生不息·华流季》以音乐对抗与融合为引，推动华语音乐走向世界。从金曲回忆到文化共鸣，跨越三代的声音在舞台上汇聚，用旋律唤醒集体记忆，谱写属于华语乐坛的自信新章。

programme.title: 长相思第一季
programme.desc: 流落大荒的皓翎王姬小夭 历经百年颠沛之苦，在清水镇成为悬壶为生的玟小六，机缘之下与玱玹, 涂山璟, 相柳, 阿念, 赤水丰隆等人上演了一场亲情, 爱情, 友情的纠葛故事。

programme.title: 把关者们
programme.desc: 故事围绕版权及商标调查科高级监督海锋（袁伟豪饰）、总贸易管制主任关佩欣（黄智雯饰）、海关毒品调查课监督温芷祺（王敏奕饰）与一众海关菁英追究原子弹、白粉等海关风波。

programme.title: 非诚勿扰 12
programme.desc: 非诚勿扰是一档适应现代生活节奏的大型婚恋交友节目, 在广大单身男女提供了一个公开的婚恋交友平台的同时, 也迎来了新的当红男星作为新一任的非诚合伙人。

programme.title: 我想和你唱5
programme.desc: 《我想和你唱》第五季震撼回归！本季节目将继续升维星素共唱新玩法，通过搭档形式，让广大民众展现才华，演绎出多元的音乐风格。让我们一同感受大众力量的扩音，沉浸式体验音乐最本真的愉悦，让记忆中的美妙旋律闪耀发光吧!

programme.title: 把关者们
programme.desc: 故事围绕版权及商标调查科高级监督海锋（袁伟豪饰）、总贸易管制主任关佩欣（黄智雯饰）、海关毒品调查课监督温芷祺（王敏奕饰）与一众海关菁英追究原子弹、白粉等海关风波。

programme.title: 市井豪门
programme.desc: 一条街隔开两个世界。一边是努力生活有苦也有笑的市场人生，一边是勾心斗角有钱却战战兢兢的豪门日子。

programme.title: 长相思第一季
programme.desc: 流落大荒的皓翎王姬小夭 历经百年颠沛之苦，在清水镇成为悬壶为生的玟小六，机缘之下与玱玹, 涂山璟, 相柳, 阿念, 赤水丰隆等人上演了一场亲情, 爱情, 友情的纠葛故事。

programme.title: 声生不息·华流季
programme.desc: 以"华流国际化"为核心，《声生不息·华流季》以音乐对抗与融合为引，推动华语音乐走向世界。从金曲回忆到文化共鸣，跨越三代的声音在舞台上汇聚，用旋律唤醒集体记忆，谱写属于华语乐坛的自信新章。

programme.title: Director's Cut
programme.desc: Oscar receives a camcorder from his parents and sets out to prove to them the magic on the island is real.

programme.title: Pajamas Party
programme.desc: When Pajamas starts to panic that Oscar will outgrow her, Oscar tries to help but things go awry.

programme.title: Space Invasion
programme.desc: A visit from Puddle the alien tests the limit of Oscar's hosting skills.

programme.title: The Soundhouse
programme.desc: Oscar and Hedgehog discover a new structure on the island and become friends with its caretaker.

programme.title: I Heart Heartforde
programme.desc: Oscar, hedgehog and the other campers are excited to take a trip to the non-magical town of Heartforde.

programme.title: Bad News Bear
programme.desc: Jake must work in the school office.

programme.title: Inoculation Day
programme.desc: When Adam is accidentally inoculated with MONKEY BOOSTER, he 'goes ape', turning into a crazed, pants-less monkey!

programme.title: Animal Testing
programme.desc: Much to his dismay, Adam is placed in the advanced class with the dorky super-smart kids.

programme.title: The Sheds
programme.desc: Hysteria breaks out at CDMS when Slips comes in with a case of 'the sheds' and everyone thinks he's contagious.

programme.title: Shiny Thing
programme.desc: Jake brings a shiny glass ball (actually a doorknob) to school.

programme.title: An American Girl: Chrissa Stands Strong
programme.desc: When Chrissa moves to a new school in the middle of the year, she is greeted by the girls in her fourth-grade class with teasing and tricks.

programme.title: The Three Little Pigs
programme.desc: Deli Porkchop is a retired singer who runs a camp for girl piglets who build their homes while keeping their eyes peeled for the big, bad Wolfgang.

programme.title: Ali Baba And The Forty Thieves
programme.desc: Ali Baba is a young Arabian girl who outsmarts the Great One and his forty thieves.

programme.title: Crashbox S1
programme.desc: An outrageously insane new game show of puzzles and brainteasers for kids to play on television.

programme.title: Crashbox S1
programme.desc: An outrageously insane new game show of puzzles and brainteasers for kids to play on television.

programme.title: It's Like They Never Left!
programme.desc: Fifteen of the competition's fiercest challengers return to face-off in the toughest season yet! A mise-en-place challenge set at the historic Griffith Observatory in Los Angeles kicks off the intense battle, where the Chefs immediately size each other up to see how everyone has progressed since last competing. Then, the first elimination challenge takes the Chefs to the beach to cook a seafood meal - however, their only heat source will be fire. No electricity, no special appliances.

programme.title: Austin Powers: The Spy Who Shagged Me
programme.desc: Dr. Evil returns from space just as British spy Austin Powers learns on his honeymoon that his wife, Vanessa is a fembot under Dr Evil's control.

programme.title: Harry Potter And The Sorcerer's Stone
programme.desc: Harry Potter learns that he is the orphaned son of two powerful wizards and possesses magical powers.

programme.title: Forgeti
programme.desc: When Gwen drags Ben along on a hike in search of the legendary Forgeti - a yeti that makes people forget they ever saw it - Ben is dubious.

programme.title: The Filth
programme.desc: Ben is tasked with cleaning the Rust Bucket but is soon tricked into letting the villainous and vile Fly Guys steal it.

programme.title: Clown College
programme.desc: While tailgating at a State U. homecoming football game, Ben teams up with Grandpa Max's old college buddies to keep the crazy clown Zombozo from robbing the stadium blind at halftime.

programme.title: The Ring Leader
programme.desc: While winning big on a Sumo Slammers video game, Ben gets the idea to win a real wrestling match - until an intimidating wrestler named Iron Kyle decides to make it a true challenge.

programme.title: Take 10
programme.desc: While trying to film his own indie film, Ben accidentally lets the Bug Gang go free and when he takes the fight to their hidden lair, Ben has to take on their narcissistic leader - the Ant Queen.

programme.title: The Thrice Cream Man
programme.desc: When Chowder's love of thrice cream constantly disrupts work, Mung cooks up a way to break his sweet obsession.

programme.title: The Flibber-Flabber Diet
programme.desc: After Truffles feels like she's put on a little weight, she demands that the whole company go on a diet. It's a battle of wills to see if she can lose weight before they rest of them lose their minds.

programme.title: The Froggy Apple
programme.desc: If Chowder can survive making a very complicated dish, he's on his way to becoming a chef.

programme.title: Chowder's Girlfriend
programme.desc: When Panini sets her love-struck eyes on Chowder, he tries every trick he can think of to convince her he's not her boyfriend.

programme.title: Mahjongg Night
programme.desc: Chowder learns that messing with Truffles' game night means certain doom.

programme.title: Home Part 1
programme.desc: Li'l D is crushed when his idol Sunny Bridges goes missing.

programme.title: Home Part 2
programme.desc: The class decide to raise money to pay for a music teacher.

programme.title: Peanuts Get Yer Peanuts
programme.desc: The class express themselves in the annual Peanut Pageant.

programme.title: I Wish I Could Walk With Her
programme.desc: Ruby gets an intimidating wish about an extended Emerald family with secrets and surprises. Will she and her friends find the courage to grant it?

programme.title: Harry Potter And The Sorcerer's Stone
programme.desc: Harry Potter learns that he is the orphaned son of two powerful wizards and possesses magical powers.

programme.title: Harry Potter And The Prisoner Of Azkaban
programme.desc: Harry, Ron and Hermione return as teenagers for a third term at Hogwarts School of Witchcraft and Wizardry and must face a dangerous convict.

programme.title: Footloose
programme.desc: A city kid moves to a small town where rock 'n' roll and dancing had been banned, and his rebellious spirit shakes up the populace.

programme.title: Premier League 2025/26
programme.desc: The 34th season of the Premier League sees Liverpool defend its title against a host of teams keen for glory themselves. 20 teams are in the mix but only 1 champion will emerge ultimately.

programme.title: 11点热吵店
programme.desc: 《11点热吵店》透过年轻世代的角度，无论是两性、职场、人际、时事娱乐等，大谈他们最关心、最想发泄、最有意见的热门话题！

programme.title: 国民大会
programme.desc: 「国民大会」从台湾的人、台湾的事，畅谈台湾的故事，以深入浅出，轻松幽默的不同面向解读社会时事的氛围。

programme.title: 女人我最大
programme.desc: 《女人我最大》节目内容包罗万象，从各行各业的奇特文化；社会异象到生活新鲜事，美艳的主持人蓝心湄将带领观众一起探讨及解开谜团。

programme.title: FOCUS全球新闻
programme.desc: 聚焦全球大事，从华府到北京，从欧美到亚非，从政治、经济到科技与文化，透过深度而完整的报导，带领观众进入关键事件的核心，补给面向世界的知识能量，掌握国际发展趋势。

programme.title: 健康2.0
programme.desc: 您对自己的身体了解多少？怎么样吃才能吃出健康和美丽？网络上的健康秘方到底是真是假？主持人郑凯云、江坤俊医师与韦汝将为您的健康把关！

programme.title: 少康战情室
programme.desc: 节目内容包含时事评论与当天的突发新闻议题，以赵少康为主持的政论节目。

programme.desc: 极具未来感场景的全新益智综艺节目《拜托ATM》，结合电玩游戏概念，挑战者将透过益智竞争，开启ATM进行终极译码游戏。一场科技与智慧的益智竞赛《拜托ATM》由行长胡瓜、襄理Sandra与精英挑战者携手打造。

programme.title: Thomas Cup QF 2 (C2)
programme.desc: The Thomas & Uber Cup are the pinnacle of international team badminton, bringing together the world's top nations to battle for the prestigious titles. The Thomas Cup was first staged in 1948-49, and the Uber Cup was added for the first time in 1956-7. The Thomas Cup is the prize awarded for the World Men's Team Championships, while the Uber Cup is the prize for the World Women's Team Championships.

programme.title: 综艺大热门24
programme.desc: 由幽默风趣的吴宗宪、陈汉典、黃路梓茵联手主持带您闹翻天！最强综艺节目保证娱乐性十足，让你笑声不断，千万别错过。

programme.title: 幸福来了
programme.desc: 高家兄弟因为价值观截然不同，不但成就高低立判，连教育出来的子女，个性和品格也大相径庭。上一代有上一代的恩怨情报，下一代有下一代的追求展望；在错综复杂的人生大道上，每个人都汲汲营营，寻找着属于自己的幸福课题。

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: 幸福来了
programme.desc: 高家兄弟因为价值观截然不同，不但成就高低立判，连教育出来的子女，个性和品格也大相径庭。上一代有上一代的恩怨情报，下一代有下一代的追求展望；在错综复杂的人生大道上，每个人都汲汲营营，寻找着属于自己的幸福课题。
